| **Reserved: Your ticket to Dinner with President Donald J. Trump! **
President Trump and House Conservative Leaders are hosting an exclusive dinner with Top Patriots in Dallas, Texas. You have been identified as one of our most dedicated supporters. [_**As a thank you, we’d like to invite YOU to join! Enter for a chance to join NOW!**_](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=0562726d06&e=13f35c4add) **DINNER WITH DONALD TRUMP – TICKET GIVEAWAY** **ENTERED:** NOT YET [_**[ENTER TO WIN] **_](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=81e6930dfc&e=13f35c4add) _** DO NOT FWD OR SHARE **_
Don't miss your opportunity to fly out to the great state of Texas for this once-in-a-lifetime moment with President Trump and House Conservative Leaders!

Entries are flying in, so please don't hesitate to sign up. [_**Your VIP entry access is available for the next 30 minutes:**_](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=ab163cd361&e=13f35c4add)
---
| [ENTER TO WIN](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=017037c9a5&e=13f35c4add "ENTER TO WIN")

| [_**HURRY! Enter to win 2 tickets to the Majority Dinner in Dallas, TX with Trump and House Conservatives HERE >>>**_](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=6c24fe94a5&e=13f35c4add) You can read the full contest rules [here.](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=c31361ac28&e=13f35c4add) Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking [here.](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=44c43434d4&e=13f35c4add) NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution use this form. To enter without making a contribution, click [here.](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=0db7522bd2&e=13f35c4add) Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Wednesday, March 9th, 2022 at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Sunday, May 1st, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, May 1st, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the May 9th NRCC 2022 Majority Dinner ; transportation for two (2), made at the discretion of the NRCC, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at a Dallas, Texas hotel, with an approximate retail value of $500. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,500. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the Official Rules. The Sponsor is NRCC, 320 First St SE, Washington, DC 20003.

name: Donald Trump
subject: HIGHEST GAS PRICES EVER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| | | | | | Peter,

I've got one question for you in light of the recent events happening in America and across the world: Do you MISS ME YET?

In May 2021 I predicted that gas would hit $7/gallon under Sleepy Joe. Guess what? I was right! I hate to say it, but I was right.
It's painful to see the STRONG America we build together look so weak on the world stage - but that's what we get when DEMOCRATS are in charge.
Take a moment to let me know if you miss me and the AMERICA FIRST policies my team and I put into place during our FOUR GLORIOUS years in the White House.
****[MISS ME YET? LET ME KNOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59881271:6Bb6VToMN:m:1:3317145305:CD86652F09221B5C1832FE755EF7D249:r)** **
I'd like to hear back from you by 11:59 p.m. tonight so don't wait - let us know if you want us back in office.
I'd ask my supporters the same question I'm asking you now on Twitter, but Jack DORSEY banned me because he didn't like what I had to say! Wonder why he hasn't banned Putin yet...
Thanks for your support, Donald Trump
---

name: Glenn Beck
subject: An emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59881383:6byiIToNu:m:1:3317145305:06C60F3EFD146B5F44DDD9EC43BADD6A:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine - and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59881383:6byiIToNu:m:1:3317145305:06C60F3EFD146B5F44DDD9EC43BADD6A:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59881383:6byiIToNu:m:1:3317145305:06C60F3EFD146B5F44DDD9EC43BADD6A:r)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59881383:6byiIToNu:m:1:3317145305:06C60F3EFD146B5F44DDD9EC43BADD6A:r)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59881383:6byiIToNu:m:1:3317145305:06C60F3EFD146B5F44DDD9EC43BADD6A:r)

name: Jake =?UTF-8?Q?=C2=BB?= CFGA
subject: FWD: Lauren Boebert needs YOUR HELP to fire Pelosi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Club for Growth Action and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Did you see what Lauren Boebert said about Club for Growth Action?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zurrga354vid5afnoc3vkqus2nmmf3vtoldnatqg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpn8pb5c9p7ctr4mmq3cdjm6sor8odjchqn1olkcer30p5hmhr7dd316lqecpjgsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6tj32sllm1jr4cj66jgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5jmepr0c5h64oh5u)
Friend, **Did you see what Lauren Boebert said about Club for Growth Action?** _“The Establishment wrote me off in 2020. They said I was too conservative._**_But Club for Growth Action had my back._**_Now, I’m fighting against the liberal lunatics in Congress, and_** _I need your help to fire Nancy Pelosi and take back the Republican majority.”_** **[_Will YOU answer Lauren’s call to FIRE Pelosi and help take back the House in 2022?_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo0nqk40uagsgvvoatt873uqvhthjo44j9hn9t9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2c9h2bs)** [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z693uk2i9o4ul224tf0bb7br149isb55apm6ojt0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2c9h2bs) Friend, your support would be SO crucial in our fight to elect MORE conservatives like Lauren.
**We have a HUGE mid-month fundraising deadline, and we really need your help to hit this.[_You won’t let Lauren down, will you?_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfrcqj2vvnqeka3n2u8rtqu78pjl0g1qokh2ell0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2c9h2bs)** [**ANSWER LAUREN’S CALL >> HELP FIRE PELOSI**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaajlgthngll1ksc2tg24vmitsqa269kkbaid1vg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2c9h2bs) Thanks, Jake Club for Growth Action \------------Forwarded Email Below\------------ To: **[_dpwillis67@gmail.com_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znlsl7rhkji0jc7ocqi1dhqonfduee7vqcjnadao_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2c9h2bs)** Subject: We NEED to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE! From: Lauren Boebert Dear Friend, No one thought I could win my race. **I’m Congresswoman Lauren Boebert.** I’m a staunch, outspoken conservative and owner of a Second Amendment themed restaurant in Colorado. The Establishment wrote me off in 2020. They said I was too conservative. But Club for Growth Action had my back. Now, I’m fighting against the liberal lunatics in Congress, and I need your help to fire Nancy Pelosi and take back the Republican majority. **Are you with me?** **[_< < Yes, I’m with you, Lauren >>_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zem2vlk54av90hah2luh7kf7qjfvn3cmska4g4to_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2c9h2bs)** Right now, we’re all subjected to the most radical policies because Democrats control all the levers of power in Washington. We have to change that, and Club for Growth Action is leading the fight. Club for Growth Action is one of the most powerful political groups on the right. They support conservative candidates – candidates like me – and help them win their races. They’re not afraid to take on the Establishment. Their number one mission is to send true limited-government champions to Washington. **Now, Club for Growth Action is launching a mission to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE. It is imperative that you support Club for Growth Action’s 2022[Take Back the House pledge.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z40qo90rh89mc1tuu884envkdrhdi119kq64rghg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2c9h2bs)** Let me tell you why Club for Growth Action is so important. Because we need to send REAL Republicans to Congress—not fake Republicans who call themselves conservative, but then vote with Democrats. We have plenty of those in Congress already. name: American Update
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9646%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=RxoK9WfeIESO2GyRrewY3Q&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26954%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9xzVywinXGwSIgIJnFamYA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26965%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eGzIVSnv5W7bjdncjuCJ1w&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26966%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iwh%2fbIRn27TLAidv5MI4Jw&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9646%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=RxoK9WfeIESO2GyRrewY3Q&sysid=1)_

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Theology 101
body:
I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt2su4pjs0l3kg96349a9qkfo0edrt37gmin508g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u4p6at34s3hbdd3n6mojep3le6q79d77m6r7ecjgc1pn9pthc4r36cr6cqrrco77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlcaqrac3ie1j3aoljc5jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1ctjmeo31cph649fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6ig85574k460uphmqlf82u6phoe6he71smkrq1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob6c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3nfure5ogr73to70a6iek5v6b2jbsbqhh8g2gd0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob6c9h2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3bahntu4j4haujk6n3623n04iodv2ifmncco9ro_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob6c9h2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpum0tj9al5mhirdab1ngjccbtsns68rres8j0o0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob6c9h2bs)** Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: American Action News
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog”captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk93udgojlj2rtcoo9966amalg8g88sli9rsco7o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ulij9cjkshqj1or6cpp74tjhc1in5cbjelrmaphlmjg7apph6qoefcrjeeqjeptnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchncoon5ddgcup34phhe2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1ctjmeo31c9jm49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpk05s5u63f4bhpr896ln212vkovt7mihki4i450_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk2cedr73olg7utkbi7uh50ob3gsfu8d955jl6do_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2cth2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhaa1ckhqpe8a9g520fa976fpbep0dgidavs15h8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2cth2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb515niq942f3gkth6hseujlu9sl124rm8neu1m8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2cth2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---

name: Rob Ortt
subject: Weekly Newsletter from Leader Rob Ortt

body:
Sunday, March 20th Edition
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mIiySAfgrIFGLu-iRMHBVDenaq8E3xZ0NQiy-ClLQKwFlzqR37APK5Vttshgf-dbcm6RmucBwiv8GdeyIvu9Saqlr5PmzZbHhI-ZiBEIwPfaQoClbAji56hrDMhK-gcfqVmnC4unxOXpKIws1zYLpg==&c=rQ-rCIrcJlEiQl2pfvFaJ5y8rm4GJL4USBhmQPgJlcw7Im1bNQkcOQ==&ch=go88IB1fZcz-yA_Xh9nJ7Qhakq7dHh-5AyeNKa6x1R-5rZTFK-EcEA==)
---
|
---
# Weekly Newsletter
---
|
---
March 20, 2022 | Issue XII
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Statement from Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt on Reports of Possible Changes to "Bail Reform"
---
Thursday, March 17, 2022
For more than two years, Senate Republicans have joined law enforcement, district attorneys and crime victims in calling out Albany's "bail reform" and pro-criminal agenda as an unmitigated disaster. As violent crime spikes across the state, leaders in Albany have continuously ignored our pleas for reform.
Despite her initial inaction, Governor Hochul has apparently joined me and my colleagues in calling for long overdue reform. We will await details to see if these calls for change are genuine or lip-service.
Unfortunately, achieving serious changes to the "bail reform" disaster requires the reliably pro-criminal Senate and Assembly Democrats, who enacted these disastrous laws, to follow suit. Until that happens, we will continue to see more violence, more shootings, and more innocent New Yorkers being victimized.
In the meantime, my conference will not stop fighting for policies that put the needs of crime victims ahead of criminals and keep our communities safe.
---
|
---
Statement from Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt on the State of Emergency Extension
---
Thursday, March 17, 2022
Families, businesses and municipalities are sick and tired of having their lives dictated by executive order and mandates. Despite a drastic reduction in COVID cases, Governor Hochul continues to imprison New York in a perpetual state of emergency.
Enough is enough - Governor Hochul needs to immediately end this ridiculous state of emergency, let us restore checks and balances, and let New Yorkers finally get back to normal.
---
| Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt Fights to Restore Military Base Retention Funding
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mIiySAfgrIFGLu-iRMHBVDenaq8E3xZ0NQiy-ClLQKwFlzqR37APKzrMG6Wml1cyR5kQ2sRUoVdz5H1_yNbDJ-OZ5tHziDV8d1hFfVAnLCecotPTxeBtTDzWga_2MHSrlk774Bbz1ymAbJPEq_-fe_GRKB3MEoFoPGThKOhfiYtfi-_Xbel6E7jwhgISbk2HrCLtaBRpaIy78enOoaoNIHREcKZlC21l8B528i1bZ89IUTBj2uetGsddqBZXN_iJT5zXw9kkUrLNA2hdi2sCS9ZUoZTIT5wc&c=rQ-rCIrcJlEiQl2pfvFaJ5y8rm4GJL4USBhmQPgJlcw7Im1bNQkcOQ==&ch=go88IB1fZcz-yA_Xh9nJ7Qhakq7dHh-5AyeNKa6x1R-5rZTFK-EcEA==)
---
After Several Years of No New Funding for Military Base Retention Under One-Party-Rule, Leader Rob Ortt Calls on Governor Hochul and Legislative Leaders to Prioritize Base Retention Funds in Final State Budget
On Friday, New York State Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt stood at the Niagara Falls Airfield with local leaders to call on Governor Kathy Hochul and Legislative leaders to restore vital funding for Military Base Retention in this year's New York State Budget.
"This One-Party-Rule trend of not providing critical funding to protect and retain our military bases in New York must end this year. Not only would new funds strengthen our national defense, but current and former military bases are also important economic engines for New York communities. That is why it is paramount that we include new base retention funding in this year's state budget," said Leader Ortt.
---
| [READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mIiySAfgrIFGLu-iRMHBVDenaq8E3xZ0NQiy-ClLQKwFlzqR37APKxYNXVb2ZmL2zjbyuHv34-ju-_pBcn2VxeHC-mh6ncrHgNtdromUrnv28wzyZCBNKTW5YvPr5FET21U4u74nLjCjxoQuP2KEs8TxtHtXWo_n4avJtTh7q4wKLNluN-hrsapIo2Aun8JaPKFb9LZULo4xtJ8Ey8kQ_BxJLw7uzEXTkmBQQRNJbZ3cUDwmTtRgO6bkGGBhag_g33Nd8Z2ejs0=&c=rQ-rCIrcJlEiQl2pfvFaJ5y8rm4GJL4USBhmQPgJlcw7Im1bNQkcOQ==&ch=go88IB1fZcz-yA_Xh9nJ7Qhakq7dHh-5AyeNKa6x1R-5rZTFK-EcEA==)
---
|
---
Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt holding a press conference at Niagara Falls International Airport on Friday, calling to prioritize Military base retention funds in this year's NYS Budget.
(From L-R: Col. John Higgins, Ret.; Senate Minority Leader Rob Ortt; John Cooper, NIMAC; Niagara Supervisor Lee Wallace)
---
| | Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt: No Cop-Killers on Campus
---
Leader Rob Ortt Sends Scathing Letter Calling on SUNY Brockport to Immediately Rescind its Invitation to Have Convicted Cop-Killer Anthony Bottom Speak On Campus
On Monday, New York State Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt penned a letter to SUNY Brockport calling on the school to rescind a speaking invitation for Anthony Bottom, who was convicted in 1971 for luring and killing two NYPD Officers in cold blood. The invitation states that Bottom's on-campus appearance on April 6, 2022 will be an "intellectual conversation" about his time as a "political prisoner."
---
| [READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mIiySAfgrIFGLu-iRMHBVDenaq8E3xZ0NQiy-ClLQKwFlzqR37APKxYNXVb2ZmL29qkiz6yNf1YcgGMZByM39EFy9YPyusw6Z3vmWIAIFpVOvo68OAPAs3doc1HdXUA27-gsIVY1jbKhTonJ7kGv_eRN2-eOs8WQla3slNOnZfmDGfCj6elkW49J3_3KwB1jjWCpbhRI7Ga9Gg9HS8U3Dy_LIs4iPJCg8vXURzK7eEU=&c=rQ-rCIrcJlEiQl2pfvFaJ5y8rm4GJL4USBhmQPgJlcw7Im1bNQkcOQ==&ch=go88IB1fZcz-yA_Xh9nJ7Qhakq7dHh-5AyeNKa6x1R-5rZTFK-EcEA==)
---
| |
---
| | Delivering Meals to Home-Bound Seniors with FeedMore WNY
---
On Wednesday, Leader Ortt had the opportunity to deliver meals to home-bound seniors as a part of the March for Meals initiative with [FeedMore WNY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mIiySAfgrIFGLu-iRMHBVDenaq8E3xZ0NQiy-ClLQKwFlzqR37APKxYNXVb2ZmL2e2jxLUyLvp3w6T-I1qcy8KxIT5IkPYvl4CDX_4tStKBlPbMGYZ-cZRgN7QLrj7p9_6hi4OooBw0LPPyjjpB3kJWNLUBpdTwunBAdVn_Plds=&c=rQ-rCIrcJlEiQl2pfvFaJ5y8rm4GJL4USBhmQPgJlcw7Im1bNQkcOQ==&ch=go88IB1fZcz-yA_Xh9nJ7Qhakq7dHh-5AyeNKa6x1R-5rZTFK-EcEA==).
FeedMore WNY is a tremendous organization created by the partnership of The Food Bank of WNY and Meals on Wheels WNY. FeedMore WNY's mission is to offer dignity, hope, and a brighter future by providing nutritious food, friendship, and skills training to our neighbors in need.
"Great things are happening in Senate District 62. I'm thankful to have been a part of FeedMore WNY's mission today and look forward to partnering again with them in the future," said Leader Ortt.
---
---
| |
---
| | Senator Rob Ortt Named 2022 NYS Legislator of The Year by The American Red Cross
---
On Friday, Leader Ortt was honored to be recognized as a 2022 New York State Legislator of The Year by the American Red Cross.
"I am proud to have a strong partnership with such an impactful organization that turns compassion into action by assisting people all over the world in the face of disaster," said Leader Ortt.
March is American Red Cross Month. There is no better time to get involved by joining the volunteer team or signing up to donate blood.
---
|
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mIiySAfgrIFGLu-iRMHBVDenaq8E3xZ0NQiy-ClLQKwFlzqR37APKxYNXVb2ZmL2wuezWP-LpAs5NmA99nci0nJTktinlMu6-tOdAo_BCW2pqK1rehx5s3VFnspgQOfurkLPpvNpooEe_1NG9bIfIw57iNGZPNRU&c=rQ-rCIrcJlEiQl2pfvFaJ5y8rm4GJL4USBhmQPgJlcw7Im1bNQkcOQ==&ch=go88IB1fZcz-yA_Xh9nJ7Qhakq7dHh-5AyeNKa6x1R-5rZTFK-EcEA==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mIiySAfgrIFGLu-iRMHBVDenaq8E3xZ0NQiy-ClLQKwFlzqR37APKxYNXVb2ZmL20MQuDsfbuS6PNNpIAkK6ld2DNYPvfLchE86bUZKjWkXektBTYAvwajTY5RNUBLl6S395C-bsxcFzA3loMgA6pg==&c=rQ-rCIrcJlEiQl2pfvFaJ5y8rm4GJL4USBhmQPgJlcw7Im1bNQkcOQ==&ch=go88IB1fZcz-yA_Xh9nJ7Qhakq7dHh-5AyeNKa6x1R-5rZTFK-EcEA==)

This calls for the celebration of a millenia
Friend, if you could sit across from President Trump at the dinner table while being served fine wine in the nicest restaurant in Texas, _what would you talk about?_
Until now, many could only dream of meeting their America First hero...
But that all changes today for you, Friend, because we’re extending you an opportunity that any proud Republican would take in a heartbeat.
**Would you like to dine with the 45th President of the United States, Donald J. Trump?**
_Your Reservation with President Trump:_
[**PENDING**] _Trump Patriot:_
[**CONFIRMED**] ****[ENTER TO DINE WITH TRUMP NOW →](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zkk4f7b798u6s7bl5ron2alfqb9jef15gi8po5ug_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob3c9h2bs)****
---
Few Republicans have been selected for the potential to win this prestigious honor. And only ONE will sit face-to-face with President Trump.
That could be you Friend, but we’ll never know if you’re the lucky winner unless you confirm your interest right now. The sole winner of this prestigious honor will be selected soon, and we would hate to see you miss your chance.
****[ENTER TO DINE WITH TRUMP NOW →](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zpvkkjghn49vfr0kgb4ou6gcfa1mc8budpa6ga7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob3c9h2bs)****
_**If dining with President Trump isn’t enough to convince you, maybe this will...**_
_We’ll pay for your flight to Dallas, Texas. We’ll pay for your hotel. AND we’ll cover every penny of your VIP dinner experience with Donald J. Trump._
Imagine the smile on your face when you dine with the man who always puts our country first.
_THAT is an experience no one could ever forget._
[**Make it a reality today and confirm your interest in dining with President Trump, before you lose your chance forever.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqbcod4rsl6fngg6l071k10spcdi87cqp0n7mapo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob3c9h2bs)

name: Rep. Laurel Libby
subject: Secret to winning the ‘22 and‘24 elections
body:
Joe Biden’s policies are failing America. Inflation is out of control. Biden’s Secretary of Education called on the FBI to
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zesshiabrmebaidvpbj79fsba9fr1bcd8cmfho0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmehrm2p1nc1q7bdj0e3hj1d75caqr2thmc5gbatjlchqr6d336krr6tr0elqn0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4dr665pbbc37m8p6ccdgm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq27nqpkm42q1js75ote756i79iej40ihud7nfp0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2clh2bs)

Friend,

**Joe Biden 's policies are failing America.**
* **Inflation** is out of control.
* Biden's Secretary of Education called on the FBI to treat parents as **terrorists**.
* COVID **mandates** continue to fail.

The best way to turn our country around is by passing the torch of liberty to the new generations. The youth of today are the future of America.

Friend, I want to tell you about a great youth organization that is putting boots on the ground to fight for the cause of liberty.

_**Young Americans for Liberty Inc. (YAL)** is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth organization that is advancing liberty both on campus and in the field._

[_**Friend, I am personally asking you to donate $20.22, $50, $75, $100, or any amount to support this great pro-liberty youth organization. Click here to donate today>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7kjgl3ck7kuo5tlm3f1768jn8vrevadrrqikpto_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2clh2bs)

I have seen first-hand how effective **YAL** is in person, when they recruited student activists to knock doors advocating for my election.

I ran as a Republican in a tough district in Maine. In fact, Biden carried my state house district in 2020. I knew I had an uphill battle, but I managed to win because YAL student activists knocked doors and spread the message of liberty.

The key to success is winning major victories at the state level. If you haven't noticed, it is state governments that are defending liberty and defeating COVID mandates.

**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq3cu5gl621iui370gv0kd5t9trqs9uvdqtm344g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2clh2bs)**

Here's how the plan works.
1. YAL recruits student activists from its network of over 100,000 students on college campuses around the country.

2. YAL trains them in weekend-long advocacy bootcamps and turns these students into liberty activists.Friend. Together we can make a difference.

3. YAL student activists are then given opportunities to advocate for the election of hardcore liberty candidates across the country.

4. Newly-elected legislators are able to push back against COVID mandates and other attacks on our liberty.

So far, YAL student activists have knocked on 3,143,336 doors, made 3,669,285 phone calls, and mailed out 466,879 pieces of literature!

This year, **Operation Win at the Door 's** mission is this: finish building a bench of 250 legislators who share our commitment to liberty.

_**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq9b0asmn96nslcml6vsugje7ai2cqeeqp9aq6go_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2clh2bs)**_

I'm proud to be one of the legislators they've helped elect so far. And I'm even prouder to be a Member of the **Hazlitt Coalition** , along with 174 other legislators.

Members of the **Hazlitt Coalition** have achieved victories on issues ranging from strengthening privacy and 4th Amendment protections to defending the 2nd Amendment.

I am looking to raise $24,000 in the next 24 hours to help YAL place boots on the ground in key states.

[**_Donate $50 >>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaiml7tra6m5jqt7r6bcbcfqhh0bac4kk0dn197g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $75 >>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zll47v2p08b0v4n1lbg6n4ci8hj3570h38gdnrj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2clh2bs)
[**_Donate $100 >>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1f5uaq76pfdvvv2i1bc54elsbb0do65vs0gb7v8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2clh2bs)
[**_Donate $250 >>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3qnqs9pccdko19ftml0jd1gm7t4591g5mif0kpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2clh2bs)
[**_Donate $500 >>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqo21iha3krfqp3lk0ki7caofegrrg6tg50fdvuo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2clh2bs)
[**_Donate $1,000 >>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj0gv2tknciv6nklthn5jlvkcipt0ltdbb970mq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2clh2bs)
[**_Donate $2,500 >>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7gurk0k00avvsqngpb4sud83v073h1ua0jqb72o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2clh2bs)
[**_Donate $5,000 >>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo0mgc49rcg0lufjkoakjs9kp16qenr7ja8rbkng_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2clh2bs)
[**_Donate $10,000 >>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuupkogslm0itk2tl8vgrlrc8lclcebdod6pnupg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2clh2bs)
[**_Donate Any Amount >>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z95u8t4stkadcvf2p8iphim6on8hm636npot0cmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjm0ob2clh2bs)

Thank you, Friend. Together we can make a difference.

Laurel Libby
State Representative
Maine District 64

body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z71l1s3kh1hsbbsen895vhu3v0isbehcbrob0lt8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjmao72clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpras73c1q69ornmgoectdjceo65db1c9ib6pb6msp32t1kslij5d5km1gb4ddnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhbbd9ge9qmcdj0mdi3fc5lclp2bs)

| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zf3pnf9vhn0vu4mhqpmn5j9vbanujfcq9g99chk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjmao72clh2bs)
---

Friend,

There’s not any other way to put this: **I’m losing.**

I just talked to my team and my Radical Left opponent has all the momentum and all the steam heading directly towards election day and I need help and I need it fast.
| [**RUSH YOUR EMERGENCY SUPPORT NOW**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zoks95dobkorev3nd3im7bukhin1vli6327lalr8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjmao72clh2bs)
---

**I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.**
Look, the crazy wokers are bound and determined to unseat me and push Nancy Pelosi’s Socialist Agenda down the American people’s throats. **We can’t have a Left-of-Lenin Neo-Socialist putting the greatest country in human history in danger.**

**I need your help. I missed my fundraising deadline in February, and without your help, I’m toast again in March.**

It’s make or break time right now, and I know you’ve done so much to make sure we Take Back the Senate majority, but I’ve got to have your help RIGHT NOW. Please, if you’re able, rush a donation below to help me save America from Joe Biden and the Socialist Agenda.
[**RUSH $500 RIGHT NOW**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zt7f9d1uq9ep8ac3cng91lsbpgdp59r8r16foucg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjmao72clh2bs)
---
[**RUSH $250 RIGHT NOW**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztrpvf46c25tr5pum28jeapsirhl66ldlnvsqdv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctjmao72clh2bs)
---

name: Dinner with President Trump via Team Scalise
subject: Would you like to dine with President Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This calls for the celebration of a millenia
Peter, if you could sit across from President Trump at the dinner table while being served fine wine in the nicest restaurant in Texas, _what would you talk about?_
Until now, many could only dream of meeting their America First hero...
But that all changes today for you, Peter, because we're extending you an opportunity that any proud Republican would take in a heartbeat.
**Would you like to dine with the 45th President of the United States, Donald J. Trump?**
_Your Reservation with President Trump:_
[**PENDING**] _Trump Patriot:_
[**CONFIRMED**] ****[ENTER TO DINE WITH TRUMP NOW ->](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59881781:JlP5dToGN:m:1:3317145305:4C2108E28A91406F376D57D7003BB635:r)****
---
Few Republicans have been selected for the potential to win this prestigious honor. And only ONE will sit face-to-face with President Trump.
That could be you Peter, but we'll never know if you're the lucky winner unless you confirm your interest right now. The sole winner of this prestigious honor will be selected soon, and we would hate to see you miss your chance.
****[ENTER TO DINE WITH TRUMP NOW ->](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59881781:JlP5dToGN:m:1:3317145305:4C2108E28A91406F376D57D7003BB635:r)****
_**If dining with President Trump isn 't enough to convince you, maybe this will...**_
_We 'll pay for your flight to Dallas, Texas. We'll pay for your hotel. AND we'll cover every penny of your VIP dinner experience with Donald J. Trump._
Imagine the smile on your face when you dine with the man who always puts our country first.
_THAT is an experience no one could ever forget._
[**Make it a reality today and confirm your interest in dining with President Trump, before you lose your chance forever.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59881781:JlP5dToGN:m:1:3317145305:4C2108E28A91406F376D57D7003BB635:r)
In kind,
**Dinner with President Trump Notifications** | _Sent via Team Scalise_
Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003
---
NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution [use this form.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59881781:JlP5dToGN:m:1:3317145305:4C2108E28A91406F376D57D7003BB635:r) To enter without making a contribution, [click here.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59881782:JlP5dToGN:m:1:3317145305:4C2108E28A91406F376D57D7003BB635:r) Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Wednesday, March 16th, 2022 at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Sunday, May 1st, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, May 1st, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the May 9th NRCC 2022 Majority Dinner; transportation for two (2), made at the discretion of the Team Scalise, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at a Dallas, Texas hotel, with an approximate retail value of $500. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,500. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Baked as a Potato
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
My radical opponent [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6748%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=VIPVDH5fKMEUgS2XYlqthw&sysid=1)

Folks,

There’s no sugar-coating it. This has been a really tough month for my Senate re-election. **I’ve got a Left-of-Lenin opponent who makes AOC look like patty cake and I need your help to stop him.**

We lost some ground in the fight against the Radical Left, and I’ve got to have your support to make up ground against Chuck Schumer and his **Socialist candidate!**

**_[I’ve set a tough goal for my End-of-Month Deadline, but I know with your support, it’ll be as easy as pie. Can I count on your support?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69338%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1KIteIJadcDfmgkKz%2fEIQQ&sysid=1)_**

**You can help me make a huge step in the right direction.** With the help of your friends and family _who also love and support this country,_ we might be able to get Chuck Schumer out of the Senate in 2022.

name: Aaron
subject: A quick morning message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I wanted you to be the first to hear our latest campaign status update.
| | |
---
Hey all, sorry for reaching out so early, but I'm reviewing some campaign updates and had to send you a quick note.

First, I want to thank you for your support of Senator Hassan's reelection campaign. We're really proud to have grassroots supporters like you on our team, and we couldn’t win without you. Every contribution really adds up and helps ensure that we have the resources to reelect Maggie this November.

Second, I wanted you to be the first to hear our latest campaign status update.

A few weeks ago, I announced a historic $13 million ads investment in an effort to reach every voter and keep this NH seat blue. In a state with expensive media markets — and in a race that will, no doubt, be incredibly close — this was a decision I had to make.

But it's not one without risk. In fact, when I made this decision, I knew we didn't have all of the money to pay for these ads. But I also had no doubt that our supporters, like you, would step up and help us close the gap.

Look, I know that we can reelect Maggie Hassan this November. But I also know that we have a tough fight ahead, and I'm starting to get a bit worried about whether we'll be able to stay on track to execute our full advertising plan. We've seen donations taper off in the past week or so, and with our big fundraising deadline just around the corner, we have to make up some serious ground.

**As I bring this email to a close in the early hours, I have an important ask of you:[Please, will you donate $5 or more right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43159961/336002102/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk786-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2ZhMDc0MS00Y2E4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bNP-1_IQJLQeLqkRY54HxET56Usa2gMFmtTqDeM2Pos=) Here's the best link to donate: [secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43159962/336002103/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk786-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2ZhMDc0MS00Y2E4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bNP-1_IQJLQeLqkRY54HxET56Usa2gMFmtTqDeM2Pos=)**
Okay, time to grab some breakfast. Thanks for taking a moment to pitch in this morning.

Aaron Jacobs
Campaign Manager, Maggie for NH

name: Karoline Leavitt
subject: How GOP primary voters passed Biden’s agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karoline for Congress
body:
This is why we keep losing in Washington no matter who has the majority
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7f2auhnhogoqeita46inc18r7s2isou602afv38_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u9hrbcdgshob4t5nmcpb2pb4s2pm5cb4m3g6atpgssr32obl6lp34tbgmtir6o77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlcaqradtnc5j39p5jcjjr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1ctjm1p32chie49fg)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrhr3dhenu9lkmipvi6n2ipm55f76mo83fe520mo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctge8oj4cjh2bs)
---
| | | | Fellow Patriot,
I’m writing to you today because of how disappointed I was when **13 House ‘Republicans’ voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous infrastructure bill**. What’s the point of electing Republicans if they’re going to vote with Democrats to pass a $1.2 TRILLION bill that:
Spends a trillion dollars on **Green New Deal provisions**...
Empowers **“woke” regulators**...
...And advances the Far-Left’s radical social justice mission, using the word **_“equity” 64 times_**.
It’s insane, and **[a betrayal of the Republican voters and Conservative grassroots donors who sent them to Congress.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zredunveo154l537t4tb1a1hu1o67naao6ltp4i8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctge8oj4cjh2bs)** | | | | | | | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhpq7sbkbq0f3saqucg740qdegj2m8il12n1aim8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctge8oj4cjh2bs)
---
When I worked in the Trump White House, those same Republicans denied President Trump’s request for _just $25 Billion to build the border wall_. Then they cave in a matter of days for Biden’s $1.2 Trillion.

**_Shameful._**

This is why Republican Primaries matter so much, it’s the grassroots’ chance to send true conservatives to Washington, not Establishment Hacks.
| | | | | | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za1rh27n34n3q04n14tjtqaa1fiu6plah4vpdpio_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctge8oj4cjh2bs)
---
**I promise you, if we keep electing the same spineless RINOs we have been for decades, we’ll never see conservative victories from Washington again.**

Now that I’ve made my case to you, I’d like to share a bit about myself. My name is Karoline Leavitt, I’m a 24 year old America First Patriot from a small business family in New Hampshire.

I **_served President Trump in the White House_** under Kayleigh McEnany and then served as Elise Stefanik’s communications director during her **successful effort to kick Liz Cheney out of House Leadership**. After seeing the disastrous effects of the Biden Administration’s first 6 months, I felt a calling to serve my home district in Congress.
| | | | | | [DONATE $25!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztukqiis6bhcna53d32mkdvn3hvgl6kn9jffeoe8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctge8oj4cjh2bs)
---
I’m running in a primary election against **the 2020 Republican nominee who lost to a Far-Left Democrat** and an **‘all talk, no action’ Establishment Republican**. The moment the media attacks either one of them they’ll crumble.

For the conservative movement to be successful, **we need to nominate America First candidates in our primaries** , **_or else it’s the same betrayal every 2 years._**

_I fought the corrupt media alongside Kayleigh and President Trump_ , I helped _remove Liz Cheney from GOP Leadership_ , and **_I’ve earned the endorsement of true, steadfast conservatives like Senator Ted Cruz, Chairwoman Elise Stefanik, and Congressman Madison Cawthorn._**

I know you want an America First Red Wave in 2022, but before we can achieve that, we must have an America First Red Wave in the primaries. **[I’m humbly asking you to join my campaign by contributing whatever you can today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3utfhc61qboljc5lu2ldbjd2c6m52kesajmmi68_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctge8oj4cjh2bs)**

America First is more than a saying, it’s a movement to take our country back from people who hate it and from people who hate us. **[If you want our movement to succeed and live on for decades, please contribute to my campaign, I won’t let you down.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk1egms2hr1f2j2lpk3vkuiag4tggh1bctpluvl8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctge8oj4cjh2bs)**

Thanks!

Karoline Leavitt
Candidate for Congress

Paid for by Karoline for Congress

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
This is disturbing [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9641%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=JpHikQX6N1pzB9uRRUbpjg&sysid=1)
Fellow Conservative, In just 10 months, Joe Biden’s America Last agenda has **CRIPPLED** our once-thriving economy. [**THOUSANDS of high-paying jobs have been destroyed.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26969%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dIu3Oz3huBmVt%2f9G5Pn%2bAg&sysid=1) [**Gas prices have reached an ALL TIME HIGH.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26960%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WZUbyP2OfmbG4tYQcNFsyg&sysid=1) [**Inflation has SKYROCKETED.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26961%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HLF59jqHruAk75zTyNwMew&sysid=1) This is what happens when socialists are in charge, Fellow Conservative. We **MUST** take back our country and save our economy before it’s too late. name: Daniel Wasta
subject: Abby needs your help in our first end-of-quarter deadline of the year.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Hey there, Peter. It's Daniel, Abby's husband.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43167744/336034750/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk801-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTk0M2U2Zi01N2E4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mylWMBSwIBbVPo4-hb6trCSSjp3GOR81P8yXozOyjD8=)
Hey there, Peter. It's Daniel, Abby's husband. This is a photo of us from only a few years ago, but I swear it could've been a lifetime ago.
Abby and I have had a pretty eventful few years. From getting married, to Abby serving in Congress, to launching her campaign against Sen. Grassley (R-IA), it's been a whirlwind. But I wouldn't have it any other way.

You see, when there's work to be done or a problem to solve, Abby signs up and _does _the work to make her community a better place every single time. That's why she ran for the Iowa House of Representatives at only 25 years old, and then four years later became the youngest woman to flip a U.S. House seat from Republican to Democratic.
When I married Abby, I knew that I was marrying a fighter – someone 100% committed to public service, someone who knows and appreciates the value of hard work, someone who's going to spend her life doing all the good she can. That's what I love about her, and it's why I know she's going to work her heart out to become the next senator from Iowa and fight for working families.
I have complete faith that Abby will defeat Sen. Grassley, but we both know how things work in Iowa. Last time around, our Senate election was one of the most expensive in the country. The Republican establishment is ready to pour millions into our state to attack competitive challengers like Abby, and right now, they have more than $41.6 million in the bank to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley, who's facing record-low approval with Iowans.
**This is where you come in, Peter: Abby can win if she has an unprecedented grassroots movement backing her.[Will you help her raise another $16,000 before our critical, first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the year? Donate $5 or whatever you can right now, and every dollar will ensure Abby's campaign has what it takes to defeat top Trump ally Sen. Grassley and protect Democratic Senate control.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43167745/336034751/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk801-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTk0M2U2Zi01N2E4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mylWMBSwIBbVPo4-hb6trCSSjp3GOR81P8yXozOyjD8=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43167746/336034752/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk801-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTk0M2U2Zi01N2E4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mylWMBSwIBbVPo4-hb6trCSSjp3GOR81P8yXozOyjD8=)
---
It means the world to have you on this team. Thank you so much for supporting Abby.

Daniel (Abby's husband)

To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43167747/336034753/496662621?refcode=jtk801-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTk0M2U2Zi01N2E4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mylWMBSwIBbVPo4-hb6trCSSjp3GOR81P8yXozOyjD8=&emci=395ea707-42a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=fe943e6f-57a8-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13784334#!).

Peter,

In the last two months, Ron Johnson has been a lightning rod for controversy for saying:
* Taking care of children isn't "society's responsibility”
* There are enough jobs in Wisconsin
* He wants to repeal the Affordable Care Act again
* A GOP proposal that would cut Social Security and raise taxes on seniors is "a positive thing"

Ron Johnson promised to fight for Wisconsin. Instead, he has only been looking out for himself and is doing everything possible to consolidate his own power in the Senate – **and it’s time to send him packing.**

**[This is one of the most flippable Senate seats in the country, and we’re doing everything we can to win here. Can you donate $10 today to help us get it done?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43167643/336034475/1638233481?refcode=EM_FR_220320FR_N_drj_60DA_7_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjk0M2U2Zi01N2E4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dcwSrd47ADAznq85bdAY19CbP_xcSF593kjTLjZ12Tc=)** name: David Horowitz
subject: Our enemies are circling like vultures
body:
The greatest threat to our military right now isn’t Russia or China. It’s Washington D.C. It’s the America-hatin
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuhl5skdd2h0qtrqppv758b2q4qrbabrn2ogffa0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctge2o76c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s9kshjm1phjmthr3cbkmjj63d3168p6cp70edq7cdjmelq36tlmeaqm0s9mepoefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3aollmkrrep366phb6ob7m2qmash5u)
The greatest threat to our military right now isn’t Russia or China. It’s Washington D.C. _It’s the America-hating politicians subverting our armed forces with divisive propaganda._ It’s Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin — restructuring the Pentagon’s training to revolve around Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project. It’s Bishop Garrison — hand selected by Secretary Austin to lead the military’s purge of conservatives, Trump supporters and patriots like you and me. It’s Admiral Michael Gilday — pitting white sailors against nonwhite sailors, citing the works of America-hating Marxist Ibram X. Kendi. It’s General Mark Milley — who sided with violent Black Lives Matter terrorists that burned our cities to the ground, bowing to the Critical Race Theory dogma to keep his job when Biden took office. It’s Air Force Chief of Staff Charles Q. Brown Jr. (a leading candidate to replace General Milley) — betraying his own country and branch of the military as its top leader. And it’s every last bureaucrat that appointed them, nominated them or enabled them. [**That’s why I hope I can count on your support of the Freedom Center as we exhaust every resource at our disposal to save our military,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9qarri1vem34v64nvdg4kihhrun2srb8t0up5e8_)**and remove the military officials working in direct opposition to our nation’s values and interests.** My name is David Horowitz, and when I was a young man, I dreamt of a day when our leaders embraced this backwards ideology -- because when I was a young man, I was a full fledged communist. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them, and revealing what I knew about them to the rest of the world. **And I can tell you beyond a shadow of a doubt that Critical Race Theory is just Marxism by a new name, and any military official promoting it is a threat to our republic.** With your help, we can cut through this administration’s lies and their media lapdogs’ propaganda -- and tell the truth to the American people about what’s happening to our military on _OUR_ dime. [**Will you donate $25 or more to the Freedom Center,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbsn5dteciddk33a5rv345rco19inknd7l7i81q8_) and give us the ammunition we need to publish and distribute original pamphlets explaining the fall of our military in detail, petition for the removal of treacherous leaders, and so much more? These hacks in Washington are doing our enemies’ work for them, and destroying our military from the inside out. They’re sending a loud clear message to the world that the United States isn’t united at all, but divided by race and more vulnerable than ever. **My Freedom Center has stood proudly behind our military for over 30 years --****_and that’s exactly why we’re taking on their new woke leadership._** Because the twisted ideologies Joe Biden’s military leadership is pushing on our men and women in uniform is putting them -- and our country -- in immense danger. [**But as a nonprofit organization, we won’t succeed without patriots like you by our side.** ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm9du0t9tq80nbfbroro853mujhjck7bh8lvn9io_) This administration and everyone associated with it projects weakness, fragility and cowardice, and our enemies are circling like vultures. Without a strong military, we’re at the mercy of our adversaries. Without a strong military, there is no America. And without America, there is no hope. _“If we lose freedom here, there is no place to escape to. This is the last stand on earth.” _ _\-- Ronald Reagan_ I hope I can count on your generous support today. Sincerely, [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi76afpdnjg8p56v02ja4n9fqff7e7fkuvhons10_) P.S. Our fate isn’t sealed. We can still reverse course, we can still restore our military, and we can still save our country – but time is running out. **[Please make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $25 or more to the Freedom Center today, and show your fellow citizens exactly what’s happening on their dime. ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za8qdk3aoec14s17pa1tlume2m2lfomqt96invuo_)** [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z82t7h163e6027cpeup5l9fo450m7j267c3ihuf0_) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znbmdfjb0g79g4ohru6725l79scgrkpr7opbuqug_) The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.
All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. **[Support the Freedom Center](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4fuhg037qucfbnqht8r4i5tcqvj9h8r0e44a6l8_)** © David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.org
P.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zun5nd6aba2dhdg5sd7qbrhlui703rm5v38h6kqo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1ctjm1ob0sph649fg)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Leslie?=
subject: Election Day!
body:
Election Day is around the corner... | | | |
---
| | |
####
# Election Day is almost here!
Early voting begins April 28-May 14th Election Day is May 17th!
---
|
---
| | Sunday March 27th 3-5pm
Jay is hosting a community event.
We want you to join us
Bring a friend! Bring a neighbor!
Laughing Elephant Yoga, 1171 Spartanburg Hwy in Hendersonville
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| As Jay travels the district, he is gaining support and enthusiasm for his authentic campaign representing the people of Western North Carolina. You can help by telling your friends and neighbors to cast their ballot for Jay Carey!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| | Together We Can Do This!
We can get Jay through the primary to take-on Cawthorn but we need your support!
* We are door-knocking
* We are phone banking.
* We are traveling town-to-town across the district.

Send an email to jay@jaycareyforcongress.com
to let us know you can make phone calls on April 21st
or when and where you can door-knock with us.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43168820/336039719/1927938479?refcode=20220320_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmUwYTVhNC01YmE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7-_djTKMVZq7ISt9TExMFHYJy5rYhQCmYjMCV7d7emM=)
Friends — In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a split contribution to my re-election campaign before midnight tonight. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Our race is going to be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country. Every day some new super PAC or dark money group is spending to beat us. They spend it on television, they spend it online, they spend it on false attacks — anything and everything they can to turn this election. And the truth is, our ability to defend this seat means we have to meet every single goal we set for ourselves. Because every time we fall behind in our fundraising, it could mean us falling behind in the polls — and make it harder and harder to catch up. That’s why this mid-month fundraising drive is so important. Because things are heating up in our race, and we’re slipping a little bit on our fundraising. The timing is not great, and I need your help: [**Can you please split a contribution between my campaign and Seth Moulton before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close at midnight tonight? We would not be asking if it were not so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43168821/336039720/1927938479?refcode=20220320_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmUwYTVhNC01YmE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7-_djTKMVZq7ISt9TExMFHYJy5rYhQCmYjMCV7d7emM=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43168822/336039721/-1534947712?refcode=20220320_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmUwYTVhNC01YmE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7-_djTKMVZq7ISt9TExMFHYJy5rYhQCmYjMCV7d7emM=)
Thank you in advance for contributing to help us catch up. It means a lot. Mark Kelly
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43168823/336039722/-1534947712?refcode=20220320_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmUwYTVhNC01YmE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7-_djTKMVZq7ISt9TExMFHYJy5rYhQCmYjMCV7d7emM=)

Thank you,

subject: Republicans are working for Indiana
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
Democrats have set their sights on Indiana — make sure we have what it takes to keep our state RED. Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/fd45af00172c7119/0587c5aee77da953c3d6b838967d376c/40313)

Friend, Thanks to your hard work and dedication to conservative principles, Hoosier Republicans hold supermajorities in both chambers of the state legislature, the Governor’s office and all other statewide offices, both Senate seats, and seven out of our nine congressional districts. Despite the challenges created by D.C. Democrats, Hoosier Republicans are keeping our state moving forward. _But it’s going to be up to us to keep it that way in 2022._ National Democrats are getting ready to pour massive resources and manpower into our state, and we need to make sure we have the ability to fight back to protect our Republican supermajorities and the progress we’ve made. **Will you please make your first donation to the Indiana Republican Party today to make sure we have the resources we need to keep a blue wave from crashing into Indiana?**

name: Glenn Beck
subject: Emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59889330:6-skaToNK:m:1:3318906893:A693C44F03FA700D21362CEDFACC938C:r)
---
|
---
Patriot,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine - and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59889330:6-skaToNK:m:1:3318906893:A693C44F03FA700D21362CEDFACC938C:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59889330:6-skaToNK:m:1:3318906893:A693C44F03FA700D21362CEDFACC938C:r)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59889330:6-skaToNK:m:1:3318906893:A693C44F03FA700D21362CEDFACC938C:r)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---

name: David Horowitz
subject: The greatest threat
body:
The greatest threat to our military right now isn’t Russia or China. It’s Washington D.C. It’s the America-hatin
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zudj64rtfsofeuohn1f0uvpacumo0r15hirdnkf8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbom6s74mkqefc9kmiqbecrk68qm4tb3c4on5d9k6hp3eor7m2pb0t9meti79pb0cv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6tj32tpl6hjr4dr66hgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5jmeo70s5jm0oh5u)
The greatest threat to our military right now isn’t Russia or China. It’s Washington D.C. _It’s the America-hating politicians subverting our armed forces with divisive propaganda._ It’s Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin — restructuring the Pentagon’s training to revolve around Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project. It’s Bishop Garrison — hand selected by Secretary Austin to lead the military’s purge of conservatives, Trump supporters and patriots like you and me. It’s Admiral Michael Gilday — pitting white sailors against nonwhite sailors, citing the works of America-hating Marxist Ibram X. Kendi. It’s General Mark Milley — who sided with violent Black Lives Matter terrorists that burned our cities to the ground, bowing to the Critical Race Theory dogma to keep his job when Biden took office. It’s Air Force Chief of Staff Charles Q. Brown Jr. (a leading candidate to replace General Milley) — betraying his own country and branch of the military as its top leader. And it’s every last bureaucrat that appointed them, nominated them or enabled them. [**That’s why I hope I can count on your support of the Freedom Center as we exhaust every resource at our disposal to save our military,**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmrgdr89nan3h7c9ptdsdnlau1pld4lklsccr04g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctge1ob7c1h2bs)**and remove the military officials working in direct opposition to our nation’s values and interests.** My name is David Horowitz, and when I was a young man, I dreamt of a day when our leaders embraced this backwards ideology -- because when I was a young man, I was a full fledged communist. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them, and revealing what I knew about them to the rest of the world. **And I can tell you beyond a shadow of a doubt that Critical Race Theory is just Marxism by a new name, and any military official promoting it is a threat to our republic.** With your help, we can cut through this administration’s lies and their media lapdogs’ propaganda -- and tell the truth to the American people about what’s happening to our military on _OUR_ dime. [**Will you donate $25 or more to the Freedom Center,**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgf24uv71v9s4blob5cem0sj6ao7gm20hffrh2so_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctge1ob7c1h2bs) and give us the ammunition we need to publish and distribute original pamphlets explaining the fall of our military in detail, petition for the removal of treacherous leaders, and so much more? These hacks in Washington are doing our enemies’ work for them, and destroying our military from the inside out. They’re sending a loud clear message to the world that the United States isn’t united at all, but divided by race and more vulnerable than ever. **My Freedom Center has stood proudly behind our military for over 30 years --****_and that’s exactly why we’re taking on their new woke leadership._** Because the twisted ideologies Joe Biden’s military leadership is pushing on our men and women in uniform is putting them -- and our country -- in immense danger. [**But as a nonprofit organization, we won’t succeed without patriots like you by our side.** ](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z240f5u3adq82cohlp6nb0e5pt5ffbdvgpafbjro_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctge1ob7c1h2bs) This administration and everyone associated with it projects weakness, fragility and cowardice, and our enemies are circling like vultures. Without a strong military, we’re at the mercy of our adversaries. Without a strong military, there is no America. And without America, there is no hope. _“If we lose freedom here, there is no place to escape to. This is the last stand on earth.” _ _\-- Ronald Reagan_ I hope I can count on your generous support today. Sincerely, [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2chi0fnbfqiuu5v2foltdt3sl8a4vhqkrqd8ogg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctge1ob7c1h2bs) P.S. Our fate isn’t sealed. We can still reverse course, we can still restore our military, and we can still save our country – but time is running out. **[Please make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $25 or more to the Freedom Center today, and show your fellow citizens exactly what’s happening on their dime. ](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2p2dvvb6i5n5efqo6f2g9pn8inu0a1t5vd3oe30_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctge1ob7c1h2bs)** [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfepke03gcag7mhk3v60h1kiu3mstg8qqm5avov0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctge1ob7c1h2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj8d6ls14prm21tu19l0u9ugl6p8bkvl9tgkkg18_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctge1ob7c1h2bs) The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.
All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. **[Support the Freedom Center](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrmgs7gam7rtb1kosiplupq82p4b0i9g1kv4b258_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctge1ob7c1h2bs)** © David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.org
P.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499

It’s General Mark Milley — who sided with violent Black Lives Matter terrorists that burned our cities to the ground, bowing to the Critical Race Theory dogma to keep his job when Biden took office. It’s Air Force Chief of Staff Charles Q. Brown Jr. (a leading candidate to replace General Milley) — betraying his own country and branch of the military as its top leader. And it’s every last bureaucrat that appointed them, nominated them or enabled them. remove the military officials working in direct opposition to our nation’s values and interests. My name is David Horowitz, and when I was a young man, I dreamt of a day when our leaders embraced this backwards ideology -- because when I was a young man, I was a full fledged communist. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them, and revealing what I knew about them to the rest of the world. And I can tell you beyond a shadow of a doubt that Critical Race Theory is just Marxism by a new name, and any military official promoting it is a threat to our republic. With your help, we can cut through this administration’s lies and their media lapdogs’ propaganda -- and tell the truth to the American people about what’s happening to our military on OUR dime. and give us the ammunition we need to publish and distribute original pamphlets explaining the fall of our military in detail, petition for the removal of treacherous leaders, and so much more? These hacks in Washington are doing our enemies’ work for them, and destroying our military from the inside out. They’re sending a loud clear message to the world that the United States isn’t united at all, but divided by race and more vulnerable than ever. My Freedom Center has stood proudly behind our military for over 30 years --and that’s exactly why we’re taking on their new woke leadership. Because the twisted ideologies Joe Biden’s military leadership is pushing on our men and women in uniform is putting them -- and our country -- in immense danger. This administration and everyone associated with it projects weakness, fragility and cowardice, and our enemies are circling like vultures. Without a strong military, we’re at the mercy of our adversaries. Without a strong military, there is no America. And without America, there is no hope. “If we lose freedom here, there is no place to escape to. This is the last stand on earth.” \-- Ronald Reagan I hope I can count on your generous support today. Sincerely, P.S. Our fate isn’t sealed. We can still reverse course, we can still restore our military, and we can still save our country – but time is running out.
