name: Val Demings [Personal]
subject: I hope you'll give this a read – it's quite personal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I never tire of standing up for what I believe is right
| | |
---
Friend: This is a longer and especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.
I was raised in Jacksonville, Florida – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've _got_ to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked _hard._ And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had _faith. _I've carried that spirit with me my entire career.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43170621/336048382/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2663-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWQ0ZTIxZC01ZmE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iiX3NrHxhdd0zG54IXuGUihjYWHFpi6NpQ6AZ1Eq_2U=)
That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me, "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – _never_ tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community.
**[I will never tire of the opportunities to do good or the challenges to tackle before me, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43170622/336048383/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2663-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWQ0ZTIxZC01ZmE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iiX3NrHxhdd0zG54IXuGUihjYWHFpi6NpQ6AZ1Eq_2U=)**
_Never tire._ These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized.
_Never tire,_ I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I _never tire_ of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law.
This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians.** ****I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win.**
[**So I need your support, friend. This campaign is a battle of many things, and an unfortunate reality among them is** _resources._**The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to protect Marco Rubio, so if you're with me, if you want to elect Florida's first Black senator and defend our majority in the Senate, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43170623/336048384/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2663-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWQ0ZTIxZC01ZmE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iiX3NrHxhdd0zG54IXuGUihjYWHFpi6NpQ6AZ1Eq_2U=)
Thank you for being in this with me. _Never tire._

Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, **[click here if you’re on mobile](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43170624/336048385/1417698435?refcode=jtk2663-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWQ0ZTIxZC01ZmE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iiX3NrHxhdd0zG54IXuGUihjYWHFpi6NpQ6AZ1Eq_2U=&emci=e3b26dc3-34a5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=fad4e21d-5fa8-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=20244100) or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates.**

clean_body: I never tire of standing up for what I believe is right | | | Friend: This is a longer and especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read. I was raised in Jacksonville, Florida – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've got to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked hard. And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had faith. I've carried that spirit with me my entire career. = That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me, "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – never tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community. = Never tire. These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized. Never tire, I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I never tire of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law. This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians. I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win. = Thank you for being in this with me. Never tire. Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. You can also click here to or click here to . Val Demings for U.S. Senate P. O. Box 536926 Orlando, FL 32853 United States Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: My Berkshires to Boston Tour visit to Norfolk County was a great success!
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Friends,
I had a great day in Norfolk County on Thursday during the second stop of my Berkshires to Boston tour of the Commonwealth.
First up was a visit to Ginger Betty's Bakery. This bakery serves up patriotic treats and supports our troops!
---
|
---
---
| I then visited with Ted at Weymouth Town Hall, and got a tour of the new school being built nearby. We talked about state funding for public schools, and visited the Veterans' Wall.
---
|
---
| Next up: a visit with Priscilla Guerriero and RG Hair & Spa, where I go to get my hair cut. And then, a snack and a chat about the restaurant industry with Andrea at Chella's Coffee Experience.
---
|
---
|
---
| We grabbed lunch at Park Ave Market Ace Hardware, owned by the multi generational Hawks family. It's so nice to see a family owned business survive through the years!
---
|
---
| I then met up with Matt Lynch in Braintree, and we talked with voters at the historic site of John Adams Plaza, where we discussed individual liberties.
---
---
Matt and I then joined Justin Fein for his podcast, in which we talked about the campaign and other issues, before I headed over to South Shore Plaza Braintree Mall to join up with hardworking volunteers gathering signatures to get me and other candidates on the ballot!
---
---
---
| Next up was a great crowd at Factory Collision & Restoration, owned by Tony Delgallo, followed by a St. Patrick's day celebration at Union Brewhouse.
---
|
---
|
---
| Thanks to all the businesses who hosted me, and all who came out to show support and ask great questions on the trail.
I can't wait for next week's stop in Worcester county! The itinerary will be posted this weekend, check for it on my Events page!
---
| [View Upcoming Events](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P3RAPecOSDCBL_3-5FCo-6WKimRgv62I43JpTz8z9smqQZEb-iqw-yc4y6qCLxU6a8Acet43kHyfxlO495OuUp7WeSOiOkKAdHYqEnLqBRWljcpoPXH86UrSUccxv4EaRfnI6DHPQiZY17dlSY0TwLtXFy13-mXk&c=yqw6rv-YmkMKtVV5CP4nRtLXr3zEVsgcMh1Q9USPgivKRtQ_z06wAw==&ch=M_aSct0Wtd31SrPuu7UYRybaAALxaNvQ2xZ4d3GSQBH4LdcRLLAqIg==)
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---

Our America-First movement is gaining momentum, and we have just 100 days to get our message of freedom over the finish line. In order to drain the Washington swamp and make America first again, we have to send a strong message to the establishment. That's why I am asking 100 of my Patriot supporters to donate $100 to our campaign today... There are more than 100 reasons why you should donate to my campaign today, but I'll name the top 5: 5.) I will continue my fight to close our southern border and deport any immigrants who are currently here illegally 4.) Senator Rand Paul endorsed my campaign to join him in prosecuting Anthony Fauci... I will NOT let him down 3.) I have a long history of defending the lives of the unborn and passing legislation to end abortion in Oklahoma. 2.) I am 100% the Proven Republican Fighter who will DEFEAT the radical socialists, take back our country, and make America First again | We are at a turning point in our nation's history, and we have 100 days to ensure that the corrupt Washington establishment will be faced with the Proven Republican Fighter... body:
I’m running to restore integrity and decency to the 5th district.

| _You are receiving this email because of your past support for Virginia Democrats. Andy is running against one of Marjorie Taylor Greene’s top allies, Bob Good, in Virginia’s 5th District. As Andy has strived to make a difference after his daughter was murdered on live television, Bob Good has spread extremist conspiracy theories and misinformation. Together we can defeat Bob Good and restore honor and integrity to this district. If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, you can[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f7d87fdd-da85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/957a4a53-67a8-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTU1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTdhNGE1My02N2E4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r4ct7DjOyy2uN8DG4xYb6f85mkqBJcO17FF4n4MNFFA=&id=104896602) at any time._

| Peter,

Hi, I’m Andy Parker. I’m running for Congress in Virginia’s fifth congressional district because I fear that we are watching our democracy crumble in real time, and I can’t sit by and let it happen.

When my daughter Alison was murdered on live television in 2015, my heart was broken. Grief changes you, and it changes your perspective on life. As I’ve mourned the injustice of my daughter’s death, I have been overwhelmed by the injustice I see everywhere. I see our politicians divide people for political gain and fail to get anything done to help our families. I see Congressman Bob Good promote dangerous conspiracy theories, misinformation about public health, and far-right extremist rhetoric.

We deserve better. I’m running to restore integrity and decency to the 5th District. I’m running because I believe, like many Americans, that democracy hangs in the balance.

[_**Will you show that this campaign has real grassroots support by endorsing me today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43172920/336054904/933503233?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTU1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTdhNGE1My02N2E4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r4ct7DjOyy2uN8DG4xYb6f85mkqBJcO17FF4n4MNFFA=&emci=f7d87fdd-da85-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=957a4a53-67a8-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=3919287)

As Andy has strived to make a difference after his daughter was murdered on live television, Bob Good has spread extremist conspiracy theories and misinformation. Together we can defeat Bob Good and restore honor and integrity to this district. If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, you can at any time. = | Peter, Hi, I’m Andy Parker. I’m running for Congress in Virginia’s fifth congressional district because I fear that we are watching our democracy crumble in real time, and I can’t sit by and let it happen. When my daughter Alison was murdered on live television in 2015, my heart was broken. Grief changes you, and it changes your perspective on life. As I’ve mourned the injustice of my daughter’s death, I have been overwhelmed by the injustice I see everywhere. I see our politicians divide people for political gain and fail to get anything done to help our families. I see Congressman Bob Good promote dangerous conspiracy theories, misinformation about public health, and far-right extremist rhetoric. We deserve better. I’m running to restore integrity and decency to the 5th District. I’m running because I believe, like many Americans, that democracy hangs in the balance. | We must send a strong message to my opponent that Virginia is sick and tired of a representative who shows up for his political allies, but not for our community. name: Senator Rick Scott
subject: Energy Independence
body:
Peter,
For too long, America has relied on our adversaries for energy - _even when we have the resources we need to be energy independent right here at home_.

**It’s time for a new generation of American energy independence.**

Senator Rick Scott put together an **11-point plan** to**RESCUE AMERICA** , and having an _America FIRST_ energy policy is a critical part of the plan.

_But now, we need your input_.

Our team put together a survey asking YOU if you think America should be energy independent, and we need every patriot to fill it out.

| Peter — **a recent in-state poll found that education is the #1 issue for Maryland Democrats in 2022 which is HUGE news for John and our campaign.** As the only Democratic candidate with kids in public school and as a lifelong educator who has been making a difference in and out of the classroom his entire life, no one understands better than John how to improve our education system. **John King is, without a doubt, THE education candidate in this race and our path to victory is more clear than ever before.** But, now it’s all hands on deck to spread the word about John and our movement to elect a teacher as governor of Maryland. _**[Can we count on you to rush your first donation so we have the resources to share John’s bold policy plans with voters across the state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43174020/336058815/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220320-b1_fr_nd-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220320-b1_fr_nd-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220320&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_nd&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=a030d79a-69a8-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDMwZDc5YS02OWE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cfFGf2TjCjlFY3Wm8XItdubYA1zit-I0NKUuYItOZUg=)**_ | | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43174021/336058816/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220320-b1_fr_nd-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220320-b1_fr_nd-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220320&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_nd&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=a030d79a-69a8-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDMwZDc5YS02OWE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cfFGf2TjCjlFY3Wm8XItdubYA1zit-I0NKUuYItOZUg=)

John knows firsthand the life-changing power of public schools because school saved John’s life after his parents passed away, and the teachers who gave him a second chance inspired him to become a teacher himself.
John has an educator’s perspective as a former high school history teacher, a middle school principal, and a University of Maryland professor.
John has dedicated his career to fighting for equity in education as the leader of an education civil rights organization and as the 10th U.S. Secretary of Education under President Obama.
_**John is also a proud public school parent of two girls who grew up in Montgomery County public schools.**_
We need someone like John with the experience and vision to make Maryland schools thrive and ensure every student, no matter their zip code, race, or background, has a fair chance and opportunity to succeed. If you support an educator for governor, _**[will you make your first donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43174022/336058817/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220320-b1_fr_nd-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220320-b1_fr_nd-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220320&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_nd&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=a030d79a-69a8-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDMwZDc5YS02OWE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cfFGf2TjCjlFY3Wm8XItdubYA1zit-I0NKUuYItOZUg=)**_

clean_body: John is THE education candidate, and he has a clear path to victory in this election. | = | Peter — a recent in-state poll found that education is the #1 issue for Maryland Democrats in 2022 which is HUGE news for John and our campaign. As the only Democratic candidate with kids in public school and as a lifelong educator who has been making a difference in and out of the classroom his entire life, no one understands better than John how to improve our education system. John King is, without a doubt, THE education candidate in this race and our path to victory is more clear than ever before. But, now it’s all hands on deck to spread the word about John and our movement to elect a teacher as governor of Maryland. = | | = John knows firsthand the life-changing power of public schools because school saved John’s life after his parents passed away, and the teachers who gave him a second chance inspired him to become a teacher himself. John has an educator’s perspective as a former high school history teacher, a middle school principal, and a University of Maryland professor. John has dedicated his career to fighting for equity in education as the leader of an education civil rights organization and as the 10th U.S. Secretary of Education under President Obama. John is also a proud public school parent of two girls who grew up in Montgomery County public schools. We need someone like John with the experience and vision to make Maryland schools thrive and ensure every student, no matter their zip code, race, or background, has a fair chance and opportunity to succeed. If you support an educator for governor, = | = Together, we can make sure that John becomes the next Democratic Governor of Maryland. — Team King Updates * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . Morning, folks!

I just wrapped up my daily meditation—and boy, do I feel good.

There’s just something about clearing your mind at the beginning of each
day. It allows you to focus on what’s really important, instead of
stressing over the little things beyond our control.

Now, that doesn’t mean my heart won’t be racing when the Buckeyes take the
court this afternoon. But it does mean I can center my attention on
delivering real, tangible results for hardworking Ohioans.

Because ultimately, that’s what this campaign is all about. We’re fighting
to rebuild our economy, lower health care costs, and cut workers in on the
deal.

That’s what is really important. And it’s up to all of us to come together
and focus our energy on defeating the far-right GOP millionaires who are
trying to buy their way into the Senate and distract us from the issues
that matter.

# Wife Saves Husband –
Stuns Doctors
_**"He's turning into a shell of his former self."**_
Lee had become so frail that it took every ounce of energy just to hoist himself out of his scooter and into his favorite Lazy Boy.
But Lee hadn't always been this way...
When he was serving our country during World War II, he was a strapping 225 lb. guy.
But now he was so weak that his spouse was forced to wait on him around-the-clock at the Veterans residence.
After watching her husband's body slowly deteriorate, Lee's spouse had finally had enough.
In a fit of desperation, she started to research natural remedies for something that would give her husband his vitality back.
After a month of not having any luck, she finally stumbled upon a "rejuvenation" drink that sounded promising.
After reading about the drink, she started whipping up a 6 oz glass of it each morning for her husband.
"What could it hurt?" she thought.
**She didn't expect much at first, but just 12 days later, she couldn't believe what she was seeing.**
She arrived at Lee's room one morning and much to her surprise, Lee was already up and trekking his way across the Veterans house.
But that's not all.
Later that night, he had enough energy to make the half-mile venture to the dining hall to eat dinner.
That might not seem like much to you, but previously Lee was so frail that he was spending every waking minute in his bed.
So getting out of his room wasn't even an option.
She couldn't believe the turnaround she was seeing.
_**"I am watching my husband _come back to life_. Energy better, breathing better, communication better, attitude better. I didn't expect noticeable improvements like this"**_
Lee's results were stunning, and I can't assure that everyone will get results like his...
But if this drink did all of this for Lee, then just imagine what it could do for you.
|
Tony W. from Nashville writes...

_"Within 2 weeks of using the drink, the amount of pain, swelling and subsequent stiffness I had is reduced to almost _zero_."_

---

Mike B. writes...

_"Susie's joints feel much better as evidenced by her ability to navigate the stairs in my house. My back pain has nearly disappeared and I sleep better."_

---

Michael W. writes...

_"I am a truck driver who cannot go without your Greens. I am 75 years old and an old Army Para trooper. I have suffered from knee pain, but since taking the Patriot Power Greens, I have no more pain."_

---

**So what is this drink that's helping Lee and thousands of others feel young again?**

It's a Doctor-formulated super-drink that was originally created to give our fighting men and women in the military more energy, more stamina and better focus.

It's so easy-to-use and it has been so effective for the soldiers that it's made their achy joints, bad knees and stiff muscles a thing of the past.

Now they wake up each morning feeling fresh, full of energy and ready to go all day.

And as you can see from the stories, folks are thanking their lucky stars for this drink.

If you’re looking for more energy, help for everyday aches and pains, inflammation support or an easy way to add vital nutrition...

Patriot Health Alliance

After reading about the drink, she started whipping up a 6 oz glass of it each morning for her husband. "What could it hurt?" she thought. She didn't expect much at first, but just 12 days later, she couldn't believe what she was seeing. She arrived at Lee's room one morning and much to her surprise, Lee was already up and trekking his way across the Veterans house. But that's not all. Later that night, he had enough energy to make the half-mile venture to the dining hall to eat dinner. That might not seem like much to you, but previously Lee was so frail that he was spending every waking minute in his bed. So getting out of his room wasn't even an option. She couldn't believe the turnaround she was seeing. "I am watching my husband come back to life. Energy better, breathing better, communication better, attitude better. I didn't expect noticeable improvements like this" Lee's results were stunning, and I can't assure that everyone will get results like his... But if this drink did all of this for Lee, then just imagine what it could do for you. | Tony W. from Nashville writes... "Within 2 weeks of using the drink, the amount of pain, swelling and subsequent stiffness I had is reduced to almost zero." Mike B. writes... "Susie's joints feel much better as evidenced by her ability to navigate the stairs in my house. My back pain has nearly disappeared and I sleep better." Michael W. writes... "I am a truck driver who cannot go without your Greens. I am 75 years old and an old Army Para trooper. I have suffered from knee pain, but since taking the Patriot Power Greens, I have no more pain." So what is this drink that's helping Lee and thousands of others feel young again? It's a Doctor-formulated super-drink that was originally created to give our fighting men and women in the military more energy, more stamina and better focus. It's so easy-to-use and it has been so effective for the soldiers that it's made their achy joints, bad knees and stiff muscles a thing of the past. Now they wake up each morning feeling fresh, full of energy and ready to go all day. And as you can see from the stories, folks are thanking their lucky stars for this drink. If you’re looking for more energy, help for everyday aches and pains, inflammation support or an easy way to add vital nutrition... Please act fast – because when we first offered this delicious, easy-to-prepare superfoods drink, we SOLD OUT fast. = – Jeff Reagan, Founder Patriot Health Alliance P.S. More than 234,997 seniors swear by this drink after it's made their achy joints, stiff muscles and lack of energy a thing of the past. What do they know that you don't? I'll reveal their secret =. P.P.S. 67-year-old ex-cop Timothy C. has no pain and he's down 35 lbs. after starting to take this new drink... "I have amazed the medical folks by being in perfect health, no medical issues, perfect lab results and no medications." = You can learn more about the new drink that helped Timothy C.=. | Linda S. I love the greens. I have seen such a huge difference in my energy and it's even helped me slim down. I am so pleased with my results and can't wait to get the Double Strength when I run out of the regular. ---|--- | Elaine L. Greens make a huge difference in my energy, aches and pains. Both me and my husband take it. We both have bad joints and can tell a difference if we miss it. ---|--- | Joseph E. I cannot get enough of your Greens. I used to be so tired before rehearsals, but these days I have so much more energy. I even lost 20lbs just because I have more energy. The band mates and my fans are so very thankful. Cheers. ---|--- | Eleanor L. Greens helped me with my digestion and has more energy by taking the double strength Greens. I do not get as sleepy in the afternoon like I used to. My joint aches have stopped and I'm 72 years old. ---|--- | James B. I've been taking greens for a couple of months presently, and have had some very good results. My joint problems have seemed to disappear and also my weight seems to be maintaining itself, I am very pleased. My spouse and I both take it. What we like most about it is that it supports our troops. ---|--- = Results may vary. Everyone's experience with this product is different. subject: How much are you paying for gas?
body:
Thanks to Biden’s mission to make America completely dependent on foreign energy, you are paying far more for gas than you were under President Trump.

Thanks to Biden's mission to make America completely dependent on foreign energy, you are paying far more for gas than you were under President Trump. The current national average for gas is hovering around $4.20!
Under Biden, driving to work has become a financial investment. While working-class Americans are forced to spend more on necessary expenses, the liberal elites use your tax dollars to raise prices even further!
It really is an endless cycle of backward thinking. However, Kat is having us reach out to see how high gas prices are for you. How much are you paying for gas? Is it too much?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Safe Communities, Safe Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
I've released my public safety plan, “Safe Communities, Safe Michigan.” Voters demand substance not rhetoric. That's what I'll deliver – substance | | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=f11470d6f7&e=0636b97700)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Peter —

I’ve released the first of many comprehensive policy proposals this week: **“Safe Communities, Safe Michigan.”** It’s my public safety plan for our state.

As I’ve traveled the state, one of the things that has stood out is that voters are engaged on issues, and they want candidates who are engaged as well. _So many politicians are full of fluff, or simply pander to the audience they’re addressing_.

That's not my style. **I’m a regular guy – a straight shooter – and I’m not afraid to talk issues.**

_Public safety is one I feel very strongly about_.

During my 34-years in law enforcement, I’ve seen the toll of crime and violence first-hand. I’ve devoted decades to helping our communities, and as Governor, I’ll continue that service by utilizing my experience to help make Michigan a safer place to raise our families, build our businesses and live out our lives. Highlights of my plan include:
* Continued funding for law enforcement;
* Advocacy and support for crime victims;
* Targeted support for reducing violent crime;
* Fully-funded narcotics enforcement;
* Improved school safety;
* Enhanced police recruitment and training; and
* Better implementation of technology.

Numerous Michigan cities have experienced unprecedented increases in violent crime the past two years and it will take new leadership at the Governor’s office to turn this around. We must put a stop to the calls to “defund the police” and instead focus our energy on priorities and programs that will actually make our communities and our schools safer. That’s what my plan will do. **Please take a few minutes to read my public safety plan**. You can download it by clicking the button below.
---
|
---
| [READ THE PLAN: SAFE COMMUNITIES, SAFE MICHIGAN.](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=213cd29c04&e=0636b97700 "READ THE PLAN: SAFE COMMUNITIES, SAFE MICHIGAN.")
---
| As I said above, this is the first of many that I will be releasing.

**If you agree with me that it’s time to turn things around in this state and Fix Michigan, please take a minute to make a donation today. **

A contribution of **$25, $50, $100, or more** will go a long way in helping me get my message out.

I appreciate you. I appreciate this great state we are privileged to live in.

I’m determined to make it even better as your Governor.

Please join with me. Make a donation today. Volunteer. Endorse. Whatever you are able to do.

We need everyone involved so we can win this race.

Thank you.

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---
| [DONATE TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=71f35082f4&e=0636b97700 "DONATE TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE")
---
|

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: $3 or whatever you can afford
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
From my first election through my last, I am no stranger to running and winning difficult campaigns.
#

Friends -
From my first election through my last, I am no stranger to running and winning difficult campaigns.
In order to win, I needed support from people, even if we didn't see eye to eye on every issue. I have always found building bridges among unlikely allies to be one of the most rewarding parts of the job.
One of the hardest parts, truthfully, was the fundraising.
At Giffords, I still do a lot of fundraising, and it's not easy—helping gun safety candidates win is more expensive than ever. But I am immensely proud of the way we've raised the funds necessary to do this work. Since our founding, we've received over 1,000,000 individual contributions from people like you who share our commitment to reducing gun violence.
In fact, most of our donations come from supporters responding to emails like this one.
But that does mean from time-to-time, I have to ask—and with our FEC fundraising deadline just 11 days away, today is one of those days.
[**Can you please make a contribution—$3 or whatever you can afford—to Giffords PAC before our FEC fundraising deadline comes to an end in just a few days?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?refcode=em220320-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1711_3935704_8umk0q&akid=1711%2E3935704%2E8umk0q)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220320-1-subs&t=20&refcode2=1711_3935704_8umk0q&akid=1711%2E3935704%2E8umk0q)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em220320-1-subs&t=21&refcode2=1711_3935704_8umk0q&akid=1711%2E3935704%2E8umk0q)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220320-1-subs&t=22&refcode2=1711_3935704_8umk0q&akid=1711%2E3935704%2E8umk0q)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220320-1-subs&t=23&refcode2=1711_3935704_8umk0q&akid=1711%2E3935704%2E8umk0q)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220320-1-subs&t=24&refcode2=1711_3935704_8umk0q&akid=1711%2E3935704%2E8umk0q)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?express_lane=true&refcode=em220320-1-subs&t=25&refcode2=1711_3935704_8umk0q&akid=1711%2E3935704%2E8umk0q)**
---
****
Since we started this work, we've won some tremendous victories that reaffirm my fundamental belief that anything is possible when people work together. We've also experienced difficult defeats that require us to summon the courage to continue fighting the next day. I know this feeling well.
We must continue to fight for every inch, because that means saving lives. Thank you for standing with me.
All my best,
Gabby Giffords
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?refcode=em220320-1-subs&t=26&refcode2=1711_3935704_8umk0q&akid=1711%2E3935704%2E8umk0q)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

A new poll shows that Ron DeSantis “does not crack 50% against Crist.” One political expert called it a “red flag.” = Charlie is far and away the frontrunner in the primary, and it’s clear that he’s the ONLY candidate who can beat Ron DeSantis! Democrats, Republicans, and independents alike are fed up with DeSantis's divisive policies that are failing to help Floridians: When the economic downturn threatened our families’ livelihoods, DeSantis said NO to federal assistance that could’ve helped thousands. When gun violence threatened our communities, DeSantis responded by making it even easier to carry a gun in public. When far-right activists championed banning books that made them uncomfortable, DeSantis jumped right in front of their parade. Ron DeSantis has made it clear he cares more about Iowa presidential primary voters than he does about the people of Florida. First, I hope you’ll allow me to earn it:

I am a proud son of teachers.

I followed in their footsteps, and became a public school teacher and community leader.

On City Council here in Cincinnati, I’ve been a strong voice for families across the region on issues of housing, wages, safety, and investing in our youth.

**[But my work advocating for families and children is far from over.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43175931/336066976/-1142949743?source=20220320_em_pet_b1_greg_30_op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWIyYjM2MS03M2E4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K8La9o1CZhsJc9X1plKtK-0ENje0_WOBg36j-IhANqk=&emci=92b9ec5c-eea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3ab2b361-73a8-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=10283101)**

We desperately need better leadership in Congress, and that’s why I’m running.

**_[Now, I’m running to serve my community in Congress, replace Republican Steve Chabot, and flip this seat for Democrats because I believe everyone deserves an equal opportunity to succeed. I’m humbly asking 500 supporters to sign their name, lend me their endorsement, and help me prove we have what it takes to flip this seat. Can I count on your signature? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43175932/336066977/-1142949743?source=20220320_em_pet_b1_greg_30_op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWIyYjM2MS03M2E4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K8La9o1CZhsJc9X1plKtK-0ENje0_WOBg36j-IhANqk=&emci=92b9ec5c-eea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3ab2b361-73a8-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=10283101)_**

The people of our district have been ignored for far too long.

I know you deserve a leader fighting for your interests in Congress -- not just their own.

**_[So I promise you this: I will have your back every single day in Congress. But right now, I need you to have mine with your personal endorsement. Will you sign your name and help me reach 500 endorsements before midnight? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43175933/336066978/-1142949743?source=20220320_em_pet_b1_greg_30_op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWIyYjM2MS03M2E4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K8La9o1CZhsJc9X1plKtK-0ENje0_WOBg36j-IhANqk=&emci=92b9ec5c-eea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3ab2b361-73a8-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=10283101)_**

Greg

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43175934/336066979/-1082236403?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWIyYjM2MS03M2E4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K8La9o1CZhsJc9X1plKtK-0ENje0_WOBg36j-IhANqk=&emci=92b9ec5c-eea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3ab2b361-73a8-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=10283101)

Greg has an unprecedented opportunity to unseat Steve Chabot, one of the most powerful -- and dangerous -- Republicans in Congress, and bring real change to the people of this district.

But he can’t do this alone. He’s relying on your support to flip this seat for Democrats. body:

| | **Vice President Kamala Harris made an embarrassing mistake** this week as she promised continued United States support on behalf of Ukraine, by referring to Ukraine as a NATO ally. **The Ukraine is not a part of NATO. **

| | **The Florida Parental Rights in Education Bill** that would limit and, in some cases, ban the teaching of LGBTQ+ topics in elementary school classrooms has been strongly supported by Republicans across the country. name: Kevin Hern
subject: Biden’s war on OK oil
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
We’re heading for an all-out crisis. Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/87da7357be31f243/7c432ecb5a069b65c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, Gas prices are at an all-time high right now, and Oklahomans are feeling the pain at the pump. Make no mistake. This crisis could have been avoided if we had continued President Trump’s relentless pursuit of energy independence. But Joe Biden chose to cancel the Keystone XL Pipeline and support burdensome regulations that hurt American energy producers.
_Oklahoma energy companies stand ready to produce oil and gas, but Biden has done everything in his power to slow them down. Now, instead of buying energy here in America, we’re begging hostile powers like Venezuela and Iran to fill our tanks._ This policy makes no sense, and it must be reversed immediately. That’s why I’m fighting every day in Congress to end Biden’s ridiculous anti-energy agenda and stop sending our hard-earned dollars to foreign dictators. **If you agree, please pitch in a generous donation to help me keep this district red, take back the House, and fight for energy independence.**** ** [**CHIP IN $5 TO FIGHT FOR ENERGY INDEPENDENCE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/87da7357be31f243/5e98758af2a107eac3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**CHIP IN $10 TO FIGHT FOR ENERGY INDEPENDENCE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/87da7357be31f243/f22efd03ef53f428c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** ** [**CHIP IN $25 TO FIGHT FOR ENERGY INDEPENDENCE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/87da7357be31f243/cdc6248f2c4de6dcc3d6b838967d376c/34143) ** ** [**CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT TO FIGHT FOR ENERGY INDEPENDENCE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/87da7357be31f243/b012c41e4bba6a85c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Thanks for your help,
Kevin Hern

name: United Rural Dems HQ
subject: We feel your pain at the pump, Peter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
Let's talk about gas prices

| |
---
Hi Peter - **Like you, our team has been feeling the pain at the gas pump.** We've made it a goal to visit rural Americans where they're at – and our founder recently completed 100,000 miles of driving to visit rural districts. But that means that our headquarters at United Rural Democrats has seen the highest gas prices since the 2008 financial crisis. **The truth is, rural Americans are disproportionately affected by higher gas prices.** We have to drive a long distance just to drop our kids off at school or get to the grocery store. And we haven't even talked about the commute to work or getting to the nearest hospital or doctor's office. We know that while the oil cost per barrel is low, prices are going up because of corporate and Republican greed, not because of President Biden. **We see between the lines – Republicans are looking for someone to blame without offering concrete solutions. Democrats have taken the opposite approach.** Our leaders have proposed solutions that would hold oil companies accountable for inflated prices, make sure rural communities have access to local healthcare solutions and reduce food and education deserts to increase access to basic necessities. [**Peter, Democrats need our support now more than ever. They're up against Republicans who would rather blame the leader of our country than actually get to work and be leaders for their districts. Will you chip in $5 or more to support Democrats in making sure rural districts have the resources they need?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43166738/336030720/311099802?refcode2=c00ec451-56a8-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&amount=5&refcode=220320_hq_gasprices_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMwMGVjNDUxLTU2YTgtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8AT2n4u_alX3sno5U3Sz-3MZ2ZWh8dGio2RbGRChbzo=) **5,391,501**
This is the number of people who voted in Cheri’s race for Chief Justice in 2020.
**401**
That’s how many votes that race was decided by. A margin of just 0.007%. This is how close our races are in North Carolina.
**$3**

name: From the desk of LTC(R) Allen West
subject: Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
Are members of our military second-class citizens? I hope you said “NO” to that.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z09u2tf50ism9h3m26l17nqknfuiit6b7p15aogo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpnbdjje5rb8tti63gncp9hc1rm4spjm1pn0tj4chobcs9nc6pb4t75c1gb0ojn6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhbbd9getgmct74mdhmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5jmep74s9i66oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhmqkr2qo1i3qqfsic788hvs0r0q2lmittnsr29o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctie9oj4cdh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow American, Are members of our military _**second-class citizens**_? I hope you said “NO” to that. Because, if you believe in equal justice for our military men and women, I need you to chip in $40 **within the next 24 hours** to support the MARSOC 3 Raiders as they fight unfair charges. **[Click here to make your emergency donation now. >>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze8v8sejdmhb9844usg3svu11rfkm3oigp9agov0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctie9oj4cdh2bs)** The miscarriage of justice that’s being inflicted on the MARSOC 3 -- _right now_ \-- is intolerable. Let me share with you what’s happening. First, Gunnery Sergeant Josh, Gunnery Sergeant Danny, and Chief Petty Officer Eric are “RAIDERS” -- members of the elite U.S. Marine Corps Forces Special Operations Command (MARSOC). Their legacy is from the Marine Corps Raiders of WWII. They were deployed to Erbil, Iraq after serving honorably and courageously on multiple combat tours. On New Year’s Eve 2019, they received permission from their chain of command to leave their base and enjoy some well-deserved rest and relaxation. After their meal, they headed back to base, but stopped first at another establishment popular with U.S. contractors. Some of the regulars had been drinking for a while prior to the Raiders arriving. One of the contractors had way too much to drink, made it clear he felt he was not being treated with enough respect by the Raiders, and picked a fight with Eric.** ** Thankfully, there were cameras inside the establishment that show Eric maintaining his professionalism and not engaging with the contractor even when the contractor got in Eric’s face. _**The contractor’s drunken behavior got so out of hand that the establishment kicked him out.**_ Instead of calling it a night, the inebriated contractor decided to wait with a large group of his friends for Eric to come out of the establishment so he could continue the fight. There were also cameras outside the establishment which captured everything I’m about to relate to you. None of the facts are in doubt. To defuse the situation and keep the peace, Danny tried to talk to the contractor and smooth things over. But the contractor didn’t want peace -- he wanted a brawl. _And the contractor attacked and struck Danny TWICE._ Danny was caught off-guard by the attack. Fortunately, before the contractor could strike Danny a third time, Josh defended Danny, striking the contractor once -- _just once._ The contractor fell to the ground and it was over. The contractor’s “friends” abandoned the intoxicated contractor who was now passed-out in the street. _Even though Danny, Josh, and Eric had been harassed and attacked by the contractor, they weren’t going to leave him in the street even though all his “friends” did._ Eric, a highly trained paramedic, evaluated the contractor and made sure he was stable. Then the Raiders transported the contractor back to base to ensure his continued well-being. The Raider’s #1 concern was, since the contractor had consumed so much alcohol prior to passing out, he might vomit and then accidentally inhale the vomit into his lungs. Because they didn’t want the contractor to choke to death, when they got back to base, they had another contractor maintain a visual watch on the passed-out contractor. Sadly, a few hours after the Raiders left the drunken contractor on base, he began to show signs of distress. As the senior medic on base, Eric was notified and returned to render aid and get additional care. The contractor was evacuated to Landstuhl, Germany, but died four days later. _**This was a tragic situation, but it’s not one the Raiders caused. If anything, they tried to make peace at every turn.**_ But that’s not how their command saw it. Instead, they were charged with manslaughter, negligent homicide, obstruction of justice, and violation of orders. Now, Danny and Josh are facing up to 25 years in prison simply because they acted in self-defense. You are probably wondering why I didn’t include Eric in that list as well. Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet already got his charges dropped once, after a senior officer threatened to tank his lawyer’s career if he zealously defended the Raider -- in other words, if he did his job. But the government is appealing the case and now this hero must ONCE AGAIN fight to prove he did nothing wrong. **We must remember the key facts:**
1. The Raiders didn’t start the confrontation and attempted to diffuse the situation more than once;
2. The Raiders were never the aggressors, but always acted in self-defense and with restraint (one punch);
3. When the contractor’s “friends” abandoned him, the Raiders took charge of his care, brought him back to base, and saw that he was being watched.

_**The Raiders did everything right.**_ But their command -- ignoring the U.S. Constitution -- began to take inappropriate actions to make them look guilty. The command removed Danny, Josh, and Eric from their jobs, revoked their security clearances, canceled their special-duty pay, and began a messaging campaign saying they were an example of “How Not to Act...” _...all before any charges were officially given!_ Our JUSTICE FOR THE MARSOC 3 campaign is our best chance to stop the railroading of Danny, Josh, and Eric. But we’ll only be able to continue supporting these brave men with your support. **[Click here to make a donation and help us get JUSTICE for the MARSOC 3. >>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1dg51i5tfcntd6tivjua5ntpdqah2o0ghph5g70_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctie9oj4cdh2bs)** As a combat veteran, who proudly wore our Nation’s uniform for 22 years, I feel we owe a debt of gratitude to men like Danny, Josh, and Eric who risked their lives for us. I don’t think our service members lose their constitutional rights when they put on their uniforms. If anything, we owe them greater constitutional protections for their service! _**We need to raise $463,000 to help get these heroes a fair trial.**_ I’m not expecting you or anyone else to write a check for $463,000 right now. **But I am counting on a gift of $40.**
---
[**GIFT $40 NOW**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs59c0bil76o86p71q8snufml764neot2ktvivto_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctie9oj4cdh2bs)
---
If you are truly blessed and can make a larger donation of $50, $100, $200, or more, you’d truly be going above and beyond the call of duty. _**[Please help me get justice for Danny, Josh, and Eric by clicking here and making a donation of any size right now.>>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z64o4gi2iml2464amp1aikgphipktmlp2lr4e8i8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctie9oj4cdh2bs)**_
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoq7mbbqm7n5jqg0n09bofh7jlkq5a4iiv0sga2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7ctie9oj4cdh2bs)
---
| | LTC(R) Allen B. WestCongressman (2011-2013)
---

name: V. Demings
subject: I cannot win in Florida without you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I want you to hear this directly from me.
| | |
---
Friend,

I want you to hear this directly from me: I cannot win in Florida without you. **And right now, as I'm coming up short of my fundraising goal, I have nowhere else to turn. **
A poll of my race shows the numbers are close (I'm just 2 points behind Marco Rubio!). I need to surge _ahead_ , friend – _ _ and the only way to do it is by hitting my $25,000 grassroots fundraising goal. Missing this goal isn't an option.
Running a campaign in Florida is expensive – and Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 points (_10,033 votes_), so every dollar will make a difference. With Marco Rubio and the Senate Republican campaign arm pulling in a combined $32 million last quarter, **missing my goal could cost Floridians and our country a meaningful win.**
Grassroots supporters like you propelled my campaign launch to historic heights. _Your_ support fueled The Cook Political Report to increase my odds of winning. And this grassroots team is the reason political pundits across the board are saying I have what it takes to defeat Sen. Marco Rubio.
So, friend, here I am, writing to you again. I know you hear a lot from me, but it's only because I _trust_ you and _believe_ that I can't do this without you. Please, if you can spare any donation before midnight to close our fundraising gap, it would mean the world to me.
Here's the best link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43177112/336071986/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2695-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWZmYzk0MS03OGE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ytpN80WsIot9VPtBjkvFunDHb4IVML17z6ZgD1QzZE=)
Thank you so much for your support,

Val Demings
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43177113/336071987/-144803992?refcode=jtk2695-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWZmYzk0MS03OGE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ytpN80WsIot9VPtBjkvFunDHb4IVML17z6ZgD1QzZE=&emci=2f750e3e-01a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=d5ffc941-78a8-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=20244100), or click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2f750e3e-01a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/d5ffc941-78a8-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWZmYzk0MS03OGE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ytpN80WsIot9VPtBjkvFunDHb4IVML17z6ZgD1QzZE=&id=123159867). subject: Ramping Up to WIN
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN KOVACS FOR CONGRESS
body:

| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/3172b17fe3d24b4c/89f9deed562f9cf4c3d6b838967d376c/37373)

Fellow Conservative, Susie Lee is more vulnerable than ever because folks here in the Third District are FED UP with the Democrats’ radical agenda in Washington. By supporting this agenda, she has revealed herself to be a Biden-Pelosi puppet.

But we need a true AMERICA FIRST conservative to finish the job and send her packing!

This primary race is heating up. Last week, we kicked off our 90-Day Victory Drive.

We also have our final all-important End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline coming up next week. It’s vital that we post strong numbers to keep up our momentum in this race and to fuel our fight to WIN.

Your support is critical, Fellow Conservative. [**Please contribute today to help us reach our goal.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/3172b17fe3d24b4c/6bf015829c112db9c3d6b838967d376c/37373)

| Peter,

This fall, our campaign will face yet another close race. In 2018 and 2020, we campaigned hard, communicated well, **and won by slim margins.**

This year, the story is much the same. National Republicans and my **NINE opponents** all have their sights set on **flipping VA-07 red.**

And in a district that went to Biden in 2020 but that our **Republican governor won by more than 5 points** last fall, we have to gear up to defend against Republican momentum.

**But I 'm confident that with committed supporters like you in our corner, we'll win this fall.**

We did it in our last two election cycles and we'll do it again this year.

**But we can 't do it alone. Contributions from supporters enable us to hire campaign staff, run ads, and introduce our campaign to new voters in VA-07. [_With that in mind, will you consider making your first contribution to our campaign today?_](https://act.myngp.com/el/eti1voLK7uczvQjqOLtQF7Zluoaoel63xVf_nCTOunQ=/hSKuSMJ2lOZIEM0IjKljj1OTJFI1xlDI13fYJyiLiYQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220320-nd-EM&amount=25)**

subject: I’ll cut to the chase, Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Please think carefully about the consequences of what you do next.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59885109:6ZBI9ToN5:m:1:3299561967:7A7C544202D89CDDF1590674EA6D2C03:r)
You know me.
I'm not the kind of person to beat around the bush. President Trump and I have that in common.
**So I hope you 'll listen to me when I tell you that I'm devastated:**
The Democrats pulled in over a BILLION dollars online last year with one express purpose: to wipe out each and every ally of President Donald J. Trump. It's more cash than any of us could have imagined. This is bad. VERY bad.
_So I 'll cut to the chase:_
I know it's a lot to ask, but we need a [**surge of donations**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59885109:6ZBI9ToN5:m:1:3299561967:7A7C544202D89CDDF1590674EA6D2C03:r) ASAP if we're going to save President Trump's closest allies... tomorrow will be too late.
I'm hoping you'll rise to the occasion right now before the end of the day.
[**Help Save President Trump 's Top Allies >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59885109:6ZBI9ToN5:m:1:3299561967:7A7C544202D89CDDF1590674EA6D2C03:r)
Please think carefully about the consequences of what you do next.
**The way I see it, you only have two choices:**
You can either delete this email, wave the white flag, and let the Democrats overwhelm ALL of President Trump's most loyal allies in Congress with their massive fundraising advantage...
[**... OR YOU CAN STAND WITH US, FIGHT BACK, AND WIN!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59885109:6ZBI9ToN5:m:1:3299561967:7A7C544202D89CDDF1590674EA6D2C03:r)
I've made my decision. I'm standing with President Trump. _What about you?_
For freedom,
Jim Jordan

name: Team Booker
subject: On the road again…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

As you may know, our team and Charles have been on the road in Kentucky
for most of the year. We’ve been gathering in parking lots, distilleries,
and labor halls to share our vision for Kentucky:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220320?refcode=em20220320&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1671_346206_J3HgQF&akid=1671%2E346206%2EJ3HgQF ]Charles speaking to audience in parking lot

Our next stop? Carroll County, Kentucky — and we couldn’t be more excited
to keep having these conversations with our neighbors. Because these
conversations are the start of our work to unite our Commonwealth and make
sure we finally send someone to the U.S. Senate who will fight for us.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220320?refcode=em20220320&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=1671_346206_J3HgQF&akid=1671%2E346206%2EJ3HgQF ]If we want to win, we need to continue ramping up our voter outreach
efforts and planning more trips like this, and make sure our people-power
is felt on Election Day. Will you chip in to help us make this work
happen?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220320?refcode=em20220320&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1671_346206_J3HgQF&akid=1671%2E346206%2EJ3HgQF ]Contribute $5

From training volunteers, printing rally signs, paying for gas to fuel the
tank, and running our political ads to make sure our message reaches every
corner of every household in Kentucky — there’s a lot of expenses ahead
for our campaign.

That’s not to mention that we’ll need significant resources and funding to
compete with the corporate PAC and special interest money that has
protected Rand’s seat.

To give you a sense of what we’re up against: Rand raised nearly $4
million in the final quarter of 2021.

And his friends in Wall Street, Big Pharma, and the fossil fuel industry
are ramping up their donations to make sure Rand stays in office —
particularly this month, with our first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising
deadline coming up on March 31.

We don’t need $4 million from fossil fuels or Big Pharma — because we have
supporters like you,
Peter. But that does make
fundraising a bit more challenging, as we rely on donations from emails
like this to make sure we have the funds we need to replace Rand Paul.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220320?refcode=em20220320&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1671_346206_J3HgQF&akid=1671%2E346206%2EJ3HgQF ]It’s going to take a powerful, grassroots funded movement to organize
and mobilize enough folks to take back our power. That’s why we’re asking
for your support right now. Please chip in $5 to help us
power the next leg of our road trip.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220320?refcode=em20220320&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1671_346206_J3HgQF&akid=1671%2E346206%2EJ3HgQF ]Contribute $5

Thanks,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220320-1671-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1671_346206_J3HgQF&akid=1671%2E346206%2EJ3HgQF

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

clean_body: [1]Charles Booker Peter, As you may know, our team and Charles have been on the road in Kentucky for most of the year. We’ve been gathering in parking lots, distilleries, and labor halls to share our vision for Kentucky: [ ]Charles speaking to audience in parking lot Our next stop? Carroll County, Kentucky — and we couldn’t be more excited to keep having these conversations with our neighbors. Because these conversations are the start of our work to unite our Commonwealth and make sure we finally send someone to the U.S. Senate who will fight for us. [ ]If we want to win, we need to continue ramping up our voter outreach efforts and planning more trips like this, and make sure our people-power is felt on Election Day. Will you chip in to help us make this work happen? [ ]Contribute $5 From training volunteers, printing rally signs, paying for gas to fuel the tank, and running our political ads to make sure our message reaches every corner of every household in Kentucky — there’s a lot of expenses ahead for our campaign. That’s not to mention that we’ll need significant resources and funding to compete with the corporate PAC and special interest money that has protected Rand’s seat. To give you a sense of what we’re up against: Rand raised nearly $4 million in the final quarter of 2021. And his friends in Wall Street, Big Pharma, and the fossil fuel industry are ramping up their donations to make sure Rand stays in office — particularly this month, with our first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline coming up on March 31. We don’t need $4 million from fossil fuels or Big Pharma — because we have supporters like you, Peter. But that does make fundraising a bit more challenging, as we rely on donations from emails like this to make sure we have the funds we need to replace Rand Paul. [ ]It’s going to take a powerful, grassroots funded movement to organize and mobilize enough folks to take back our power. That’s why we’re asking for your support right now. Please chip in $5 to help us power the next leg of our road trip. [ ]Contribute $5 Thanks, Team Booker Contribute to Charles Booker:

name: Mark Kelly and Gabby Giffords
subject: We are writing together with an important (and interesting) request -- humbly asking if you can chip in $3 before our FEC deadline.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
An important (and interesting) message from Gabby Giffords and Mark Kelly.
#

| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| Hey everybody it’s Mark Kelly.Mark Kelly
And Gabby Giffords.Gabby Giffords |
| Gabby and I are coming to you today to ask if you’d help us hold this Senate seat in Arizona by [**making a $20.22 donation to my campaign before our FEC fundraising deadline ends in just a few days.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220320-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2384_6688874_5G1ezk&akid=2384%2E6688874%2E5G1ezk)** Mark Kelly
This is important.Gabby Giffords |
| Grassroots donations like yours are what keep our campaign moving ahead. And not just ahead...Mark Kelly
Full speed ahead!Gabby Giffords |
| Because that’s exactly how we’re going to win this race. One donation at a time.Mark Kelly
It means so much to Mark and me. This is so important for Arizona and for our country. We cannot do it alone.Gabby Giffords |
| Like Gabby says, we cannot do this alone. It requires a team.Mark Kelly
Yes, a team.Gabby Giffords |
| So please...Mark Kelly
[**Can you please make a $20.22 contribution — or whatever amount you can afford — to Mark Kelly’s Senate campaign before our FEC filing deadline comes to an end and we're legally required to report how much we've raised? This is so important.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220320-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2384_6688874_5G1ezk&akid=2384%2E6688874%2E5G1ezk)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220320-1-7&t=21&refcode2=2384_6688874_5G1ezk&akid=2384%2E6688874%2E5G1ezk)**
---
****
| **[Donate $20.22](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=20.22&refcode=em220320-1-7&t=22&refcode2=2384_6688874_5G1ezk&akid=2384%2E6688874%2E5G1ezk)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220320-1-7&t=23&refcode2=2384_6688874_5G1ezk&akid=2384%2E6688874%2E5G1ezk)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220320-1-7&t=24&refcode2=2384_6688874_5G1ezk&akid=2384%2E6688874%2E5G1ezk)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220320-1-7&t=25&refcode2=2384_6688874_5G1ezk&akid=2384%2E6688874%2E5G1ezk)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&refcode=em220320-1-7&t=26&refcode2=2384_6688874_5G1ezk&akid=2384%2E6688874%2E5G1ezk)**

****
* * *
Thank you in advance for your continued support.
– Mark Kelly & Gabby Giffords –

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=2384%2E6688874%2E5G1ezk).

As I think through everything we can, and must, achieve over the next 100 days, I am filled with excitement and anxiety. Our campaign started stronger than anyone imagined. From raising more in the first month than the entire 2020 election cycle, to building a sophisticated, data based, voter targeting operation that has already led to 127,648 voter contacts. We know we have built something that IL-7 hasn’t seen in decades, if ever. **Team, we started strong, but we have to finish stronger.** We are up against a corporate-backed incumbent surrounded by a sense of inevitability, and a population of voters who have been told, year after year, that they don’t deserve better. **We deserve better.** [**This is the first day of the final phase of our election, and I’m asking you to chip in. If you’ve never donated, start with $3. clean_body: We are in the final phase. | | | Dear Team, Today marks 100 days until election day. As I think through everything we can, and must, achieve over the next 100 days, I am filled with excitement and anxiety. Our campaign started stronger than anyone imagined. From raising more in the first month than the entire 2020 election cycle, to building a sophisticated, data based, voter targeting operation that has already led to 127,648 voter contacts. We know we have built something that IL-7 hasn’t seen in decades, if ever. Team, we started strong, but we have to finish stronger. We are up against a corporate-backed incumbent surrounded by a sense of inevitability, and a population of voters who have been told, year after year, that they don’t deserve better. We deserve better. It’s going to take everything all of us have, every day for the next 100 days to win this race, but our voices are louder and our cause is just. Together we are going to change IL-7 forever. In solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Dr. Oz + David McCormick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek,
As you probably know by now, our primary election is in less than two months (which is why we would greatly appreciate it if you could **[chip in a donation to help us mobilize more voters ahead of Election Day).](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45669?refcode=em20220320-5045&t=1&akid=5045%2E434096%2ELqCIPY)**
It’s easy to forget that the GOP primary election is less than two months away, too.
**So here is a fact sheet with everything you need to know about the two men who we could be up against in November.**
**_Dr. Mehmet Oz_**
* Dr. Oz is a Republican multi-millionaire who kicked off his campaign with a multi-million dollar ad buy.
* Oz is a longtime resident of New Jersey — NOT of Pennsylvania.
* He’s one of Donald Trump’s favorite doctors and a Trump administration appointee.
* He has a history of pushing deadly disinformation about COVID-19 and highlighting vaccine deniers on his TV show.
* Oz has spent the last decade profiting off of provably false obscure medical theories and conspiracies.
* He has support from a super PAC run by longtime GOP operatives and has spent more on TV ads than any other Senate candidate in the entire country.

---

**_David McCormick_**
* McCormick was the CEO of the LARGEST hedge fund in the world.
* As CEO, McCormick laid off PA workers and hired workers in China and India.
* When he announced his campaign, he was *still* registered to vote in Connecticut — and hasn’t lived in PA since 2007.
* He’s bringing former Trump advisors Stephen Miller and Hope Hicks to PA along with him, and is endorsed by Mike Pompeo, Donald Trump’s Secretary of State.
* Ted Cruz not only endorsed McCormick, but came out to PA to rally with him.

---
So... yeah. Those are our top two opponents on the GOP side. Together with their super PACs and self-funding, they’ve funneled nearly $40 million in TV ads into PA. Oz, McCormick, and the GOP elite think they can buy this election, Derek.
We can’t let them get away with that.
**John Fetterman is the _only_ Democrat in this race who is beating Oz and McCormick in the polls. He’s our best chance at flipping this seat blue, and he needs your support.**
**[If you’re ready to defeat these two self-funding conservatives, please consider chipping in a donation of any amount today to help send John to the U.S. Senate and flip this seat blue.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45669?refcode=em20220320-5045&t=2&akid=5045%2E434096%2ELqCIPY)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45669?refcode=em20220320-5045&amounts=5&t=21&akid=5045%2E434096%2ELqCIPY)**
Together, we can win this.
Thanks for your support,
— Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220320-5045-footer&t=22&refcode2=5045_434096_LqCIPY&akid=5045%2E434096%2ELqCIPY)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=5045%2E434096%2ELqCIPY)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=5045%2E434096%2ELqCIPY)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Thanks to my mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Even though we struggled, my mom taught my siblings and me the importance of hard work and serving our community
#

Hey folks,
I grew up in the projects of North Philly. We moved around a lot to avoid eviction, and I even had to watch my mom ration her insulin because — even though she worked in health care as a nurse aide — she couldn't afford her own medications.
Even though we struggled, my mom taught my siblings and me the importance of hard work and serving our community. She'd make us kids volunteer with her even when our food and housing were insecure.
She’d say: _“Nobody can do everything, but everybody can do something. You always have more than someone else.”_
Thanks to her encouragement, I ran for junior block captain at the age of 13. Now, thanks to this grassroots team, I'm running for the United States Senate to make sure families like ours can finally get in on the American dream.
But I have to be completely honest with you. With our final quarterly FEC deadline quickly approaching at the end of this month, and time running out to hit our goals, I need your urgent support.
This is one of our last chances to show everyone watching our campaign that we can win this race and flip this Pennsylvania Senate seat.
So please, I am humbly asking:
[Can you make a $3 contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate today? Our best chance at progress for working families is at stake, and we cannot afford to come up short ahead of our final quarterly FEC deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43169387/336043070/-358086307?refcode2=ef8c576b-5ea8-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=em220320-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjhjNTc2Yi01ZWE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IRg0dRufxCjHzCQejBnE8iDjbdw_lpeYyRlWBg2zh3w=)

clean_body: Even though we struggled, my mom taught my siblings and me the importance of hard work and serving our community Hey folks, I grew up in the projects of North Philly. We moved around a lot to avoid eviction, and I even had to watch my mom ration her insulin because — even though she worked in health care as a nurse aide — she couldn't afford her own medications. Even though we struggled, my mom taught my siblings and me the importance of hard work and serving our community. She'd make us kids volunteer with her even when our food and housing were insecure. She’d say: “Nobody can do everything, but everybody can do something. You always have more than someone else.” Thanks to her encouragement, I ran for junior block captain at the age of 13. Now, thanks to this grassroots team, I'm running for the United States Senate to make sure families like ours can finally get in on the American dream. But I have to be completely honest with you. With our final quarterly FEC deadline quickly approaching at the end of this month, and time running out to hit our goals, I need your urgent support. This is one of our last chances to show everyone watching our campaign that we can win this race and flip this Pennsylvania Senate seat. So please, I am humbly asking: = = = It means so much to have you on board this movement. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. — Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 3254 Philadelphia, PA 19107 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, to unsubscribe.
