Hey Peter — Dr. Caraveo’s finance director here. In every community we’ve been to so far, Dr. Caraveo’s message has resonated: lower healthcare costs, fighting against the greed of big corporations and Big Pharma, lifting up working- and middle-class families. **But to get Dr. Caraveo the support she needs to take her family-first agenda to Congress, we have to first reach voters where they are and have those face to face conversations that our campaign is built on.** [**Can you pitch in to help us cover basic travel expenses?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43182698/336075028/-1638671833?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220320costs2_dbc4c_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTY0ZjBjMy03ZWE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RSmAOSp4ug2UTV84yfdY90ZBoTaf2NXJ-nVJnI9CjUk=) I’ve broken down what some of the most common donation amounts help us do, so you know exactly where your dollars are going! _$4 covers one gallon of gas (yikes!), and will take us from Thornton up to Firestone_ | [Donate $4](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43182699/336075029/-1638671833?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220320costs2_dbc4c_allop_xx_btn&amount=4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTY0ZjBjMy03ZWE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RSmAOSp4ug2UTV84yfdY90ZBoTaf2NXJ-nVJnI9CjUk=)
---
_$12 covers about 2 and a half gallons of gas, which gets us from Thornton all the way to the 8th District’s northern end, in Greeley_
[Donate $12](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43182700/336075030/-1638671833?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220320costs2_dbc4c_allop_xx_btn&amount=12&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTY0ZjBjMy03ZWE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RSmAOSp4ug2UTV84yfdY90ZBoTaf2NXJ-nVJnI9CjUk=)
---
_$25 lets us send more than 1,000 text messages — one of the best and most reliable ways to reach voters when in-person isn’t an option_
[Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43182701/336075037/-1638671833?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220320costs2_dbc4c_allop_xx_btn&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTY0ZjBjMy03ZWE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RSmAOSp4ug2UTV84yfdY90ZBoTaf2NXJ-nVJnI9CjUk=)
---
_$50 fills up an entire tank of gas, so we can spend more time on the road and less time asking supporters for their hard-earned money_
[Donate $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43182702/336075044/-1638671833?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220320costs2_dbc4c_allop_xx_btn&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTY0ZjBjMy03ZWE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RSmAOSp4ug2UTV84yfdY90ZBoTaf2NXJ-nVJnI9CjUk=)

No matter what, we won't cut back on outreach to voters. But the more we raise now, the more effective that outreach will be, and the more conversations we can have with the people whose votes we’re asking for.
Thanks for your help!
Divya Baron, Finance Director
Caraveo for Congress

| Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests.

Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests. Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. = | = | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
Sen. Grassley has turned his back on Iowans in favor of conspiracy theories and lies.
| | | Peter – when I was on MSNBC, they asked me: "why do you think Chuck Grassley is so all in on Trump and the Big Lie?"

**I have quite a few thoughts on that. Let me explain.**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43188393/336095085/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk740-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWVlOTZlMi1hMmE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Z5_LR-3S_JHI_aJWVrqEgjaeuqUr--ZNBD1YxDLfVM=)
I watched Sen. Grassley stand on stage with Donald Trump and _enthusiastically_ _accept_ his "complete and total endorsement."

I watched Sen. Grassley _fervently_ _defend_ Donald Trump's attempts to use the Department of Justice to overturn our free and fair election.

I even watched Sen. Grassley _proudly_ _promote_ conspiracy theories about the Jan. 6 insurrection at a town hall here in Iowa.
After 47 years in Washington, Sen. Grassley has turned his back on Iowans in favor of conspiracy theories and lies. He has taken marching orders from the de facto leader of his party. He has lost his backbone when it comes to protecting our democracy. **It makes sense that only 27% of likely Iowa voters want to reelect Sen. Grassley to an eighth term.**
This is why our campaign to defeat Sen. Grassley is so important – and why I must ask you to make your very first donation to meet our urgent midnight fundraising goal. **[Defeating Republicans like Sen. Grassley is crucial to expanding our Democratic Senate majority. So please, help me flip this seat blue by making a donation of $5 or more right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43188394/336095086/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk740-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWVlOTZlMi1hMmE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Z5_LR-3S_JHI_aJWVrqEgjaeuqUr--ZNBD1YxDLfVM=)**
Although my opponent's actions are disappointing, they're unsurprising: Sen. Grassley has a long history of advancing a radical agenda at the expense of Iowa and our country. Just look at how he conspired with Mitch McConnell's allies to steal a Supreme Court seat from President Obama – and then rammed through confirmations of ultraconservative justices, helping create the far-right 6-3 majority we have today.

**No wonder Donald Trump rallied here in Iowa with Sen. Grassley. It's clear they'll do whatever it takes to take back the Senate and then the White House. Our race here in Iowa is critical to stopping them.**
That's why I'm asking you to support my campaign, Peter. You see, I'm about $5,349 short of where I need to be ahead of our next urgent deadline at midnight tonight. **With Trump and Sen. Grassley working hand in hand to keep this seat red and take back the Senate, meeting goals like this one is incredibly important.[So please, can you donate $5 – or whatever you can spare – right now to defeat Sen. Grassley, expand our Senate majority and stop Trump in his tracks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43188395/336095087/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk740-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWVlOTZlMi1hMmE4LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Z5_LR-3S_JHI_aJWVrqEgjaeuqUr--ZNBD1YxDLfVM=)**

Three polls show we are leading this Georgia Senate race, but we need your help to keep our momentum strong. | Fellow American, We wanted to show you some polling from our critical U.S. Senate race in Georgia: Walker 47% -- Warnock 44% Walker 48% -- Warnock 46% Walker 49% -- Warnock 48% This is good news, but these numbers have persuaded our Democrat opponent to launch an early $3 million advertising blitz. Therefore, we cannot take anything for granted. Our opponent has over $23 million in the bank, so this current ad blitz is just the beginning of what he will spend to defeat us. To stay on pace, it all depends on you. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | This election, everything is on the line. name: Team Welch
subject: “nothing gets done”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Mitch McConnell has been scrambling to recruit popular GOP governors to run for Senate.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=139%2E61531%2Er2GSHI)
Hello,
Mitch McConnell has been scrambling to recruit popular GOP governors to run for Senate. There’s just one problem: they don’t seem to have any interest in serving in a Senate led by Mitch McConnell.
Why? Because _nothing gets done_ under Republican control. Take a look:
**FIRST** , Governor Chris Sununu of New Hampshire said there was too much debate and talk in the Senate. "Nothing gets done. And as I said, sometimes that's considered a win, doing nothing. That's not the world I live in."
**THEN** , Maryland Governor Larry Hogan also said why he wouldn’t run for Senate: "It's a—big difference going from running a state to being one of 100 people who argue all day and don't seem to get much done."
**NOW** , Arizona Governor Doug Ducey just gave a similar reason for turning down Mitch McConnell : "These days, if you're going to run for public office, you have to really want the job."
Take it from them: If Republicans take back the Senate, they won’t lift a finger to solve any of the problems families are dealing with today.
Democrats have already passed COVID-19 relief and an infrastructure package, and they can do more if they keep control of the Senate. The climate crisis, racial and economic injustice, and our democracy are on the line in November.
Peter’s always been able to reach across the aisle and deliver results. He learned that the best way to help people is to start by listening to them—and to focus on the solutions instead of who gets the credit. That’s the Vermont way. It’s how he gets things done as Vermont’s congressman. And it’s how he’ll get things done if Vermont elects him senator.
[**Chip in $15—or anything you can—to help elect Peter to the Senate and protect our Democratic majority. He is the leader we can trust on Day One to fight for Vermont values and middle-class families.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1648?t=3&akid=139%2E61531%2Er2GSHI)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: How’s your Sunday?
body:
I hope you're enjoying your Sunday!
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/APxBfon0sG7iKGmSaO1nEA/IhLFmg7kmv4Mv4dPV768og)
Patriot,

I hope you're enjoying your Sunday!

I've been running from one event to another and wanted to reach out quickly to see if you would be able to [chip in before the end of the fundraising quarter.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/APxBfon0sG7iKGmSaO1nEA/IhLFmg7kmv4Mv4dPV768og)

[Even $10 would mean a lot to me.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/APxBfon0sG7iKGmSaO1nEA/IhLFmg7kmv4Mv4dPV768og)

We still have $22,587 to raise and just eleven days left to pull it off!

I really do appreciate all that you've done and your continued support. If you can [donate any amount today](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/APxBfon0sG7iKGmSaO1nEA/IhLFmg7kmv4Mv4dPV768og), it would ease my stress as I go into the last few weeks of the quarter.

Thanks so much for all that you do and please enjoy the rest of your weekend.

Respectfully,

name: Strength in Faith Challenge
subject: 🙏 Join us in prayer this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois |
body:
Team, let us pray for our neighbors who have been the victims of crime. Daily intentions inside >>>| | | Team, For this week’s Strength in Faith challenge, we’re praying for our neighbors who have been**victims of violent crime**. As Illinois’ crime rates rise, so do the numbers of victims of violent crime. It’s important that we are lifting up our neighbors who have suffered first-hand because of our state’s crime wave. Follow along with our daily intentions: MONDAY: We pray for **justice** **for victims** of violent crime, that the perpetrators will be apprehended and given appropriate punishment, and the victims find closure.

TUESDAY: We pray for **healing for victims** of violent crime, that they may recover from the trauma of the crime and that they may feel safe in their own neighborhoods once more. WEDNESDAY: We pray for **the families of those who have perished at the hands of violent criminals** , especially the families of the hundreds of children slain just this past year. May they receive healing, and may our law enforcement act swiftly to bring them justice and closure.

THURSDAY: We pray for **compassion for those who work with victims** of violent crime. May our law enforcement, medical personnel, and others who support the recovery of those who have suffered at the hands of criminals with the tenderness and understanding they need to begin the healing process.

FRIDAY: We pray for **hope** **in our neighborhoods** where crime has surged in particular, that they may come together in the face of violence and reclaim their community.

SATURDAY: We pray for our **community leaders** in neighborhoods with rising crime, may our pastors, our teachers, and our parents find the wisdom and the strength to guide our young people away from falling into a culture of violence.

SUNDAY: We pray for**our state’s leaders** , that they may see that these victims are not statistics, but children of God, and that their hearts be moved to take real action against violent crime.
---

clean_body: Team, let us pray for our neighbors who have been the victims of crime. Daily intentions inside >>>| | | Team, For this week’s Strength in Faith challenge, we’re praying for our neighbors who have beenvictims of violent crime. As Illinois’ crime rates rise, so do the numbers of victims of violent crime. It’s important that we are lifting up our neighbors who have suffered first-hand because of our state’s crime wave. Follow along with our daily intentions: MONDAY: We pray for justice for victims of violent crime, that the perpetrators will be apprehended and given appropriate punishment, and the victims find closure. TUESDAY: We pray for healing for victims of violent crime, that they may recover from the trauma of the crime and that they may feel safe in their own neighborhoods once more. WEDNESDAY: We pray for the families of those who have perished at the hands of violent criminals , especially the families of the hundreds of children slain just this past year. May they receive healing, and may our law enforcement act swiftly to bring them justice and closure. THURSDAY: We pray for compassion for those who work with victims of violent crime. May our law enforcement, medical personnel, and others who support the recovery of those who have suffered at the hands of criminals with the tenderness and understanding they need to begin the healing process. FRIDAY: We pray for hope in our neighborhoods where crime has surged in particular, that they may come together in the face of violence and reclaim their community. SATURDAY: We pray for our community leaders in neighborhoods with rising crime, may our pastors, our teachers, and our parents find the wisdom and the strength to guide our young people away from falling into a culture of violence. SUNDAY: We pray forour state’s leaders , that they may see that these victims are not statistics, but children of God, and that their hearts be moved to take real action against violent crime. - Please, join us in prayer this week. Add your personal intentions to our prayer in the comments Thank you,Team Sullivan ABOUT THE STRENGTH IN FAITH CHALLENGE: Over the past couple years, we have been put through the wringer as a state, and a country. There have been many times where we have all felt isolated, angry, and scared – sometimes all at once. During the Lenten season, we are joining in prayer through this challenge to come together and unite in our faith. | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois | | 111 E Douglas St, Petersburg, IL 62675 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: General Michael Flynn
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=128%2E5257348%2Ekpye5K ]Adam Schiff for Congress

I don’t mean to alarm you, Derek, but the leading GOP opponent
in my race just picked up another major endorsement from a far-right QAnon
hero — disgraced Trump National Security Advisor Michael Flynn.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220320_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=128_5257348_kpye5K&akid=128%2E5257348%2Ekpye5K ][IMG]

Here’s why this is concerning: With the lines of my new district just
redrawn, I have to introduce myself to tens of thousands of new voters in
the added portions of my district before the California Jungle Primary
this June. I’ll be on the ballot right alongside this GOP opponent and
seven other candidates from all different parties (they have come out of
the woodwork to run against me this cycle), and without the proper
resources, new voters could be learning about me from the likes of Michael
Flynn and Roger Stone.

You will remember that Donald Trump’s National Security Advisor, Michael
Flynn, lied about conversations he had with the Russian ambassador to the
United States over their interference in our election, and then pled
guilty to those lies. Bill Barr then intervened in Flynn’s case and the
Justice Department dropped the matter. That’s right, Barr’s DOJ dropped
the case after Flynn pled guilty... twice.

In the years since Flynn’s disgraceful 22-day stint as Trump’s National
Security Advisor, he has made the rounds on the far right and become a
leader of the QAnon cohort of conspiracy theorists, and his ties to Russia
(even joining Putin for a celebratory dinner of Russia’s propaganda
station, RT) and other bad-faith actors are well documented. And yet Flynn
has called me a traitor.

According to public reports, when Trump contested the results of the 2020
election, Flynn shared a recommendation that Trump suspend the
Constitution, silence the press, and hold a new election under the
military’s authority. These are the kinds of people who my leading GOP
opponent is proud to be supported by.

There is no one in Congress that Michael Flynn, Roger Stone, and Donald
Trump would more like to defeat than me. My last Trumpist opponent raised
over $4 million to lie, smear, defame, and defeat me and there are more
dirty tricks on the way with Stone and Flynn involved in my race.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220320_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&refcode2=128_5257348_kpye5K&akid=128%2E5257348%2Ekpye5K ]Can you rush a donation of $10, $25, or even $50 to my campaign right
now? The GOP candidate running against me has momentum on the far right
and it’s going to take a lot of resources to ensure voters in my district
know the truth about my record and service against their lies and smears.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220320_PM2_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1006&refcode2=128_5257348_kpye5K&akid=128%2E5257348%2Ekpye5K ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220320_PM2_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=25&t=1007&refcode2=128_5257348_kpye5K&akid=128%2E5257348%2Ekpye5K ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220320_PM2_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=50&t=1008&refcode2=128_5257348_kpye5K&akid=128%2E5257348%2Ekpye5K ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220320_PM2_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=100&t=1009&refcode2=128_5257348_kpye5K&akid=128%2E5257348%2Ekpye5K ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220320_PM2_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=1010&refcode2=128_5257348_kpye5K&akid=128%2E5257348%2Ekpye5K ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mar2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_IN_20220320_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&refcode2=128_5257348_kpye5K&akid=128%2E5257348%2Ekpye5K ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

There have been a lot of new developments in my race in the last few days,
and I’m taking absolutely nothing for granted. If we give an inch to my
opponent’s lies and conspiracies, they will take a mile — and perhaps our
House Majority with them.

We can’t let that happen. Thanks for staying by my side in this fight.

— Adam

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

subject: A sign in the window
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/dc41a4826039/i-am-running-for-congress-8862733?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=a3b4107438&e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | Hi There,

Today I dropped off our girls at a friend’s house so that I could spend some designated campaign time at the library. After some truly fantastic coffee and conversation, something caught my eye as I was leaving.

It was a “Mike Van Someren for Congress” sign in their front window.

It is no surprise that my world revolves around the campaign. It is discussed all day, every day. We have campaign signs in piles in our home office, our living room, and a few have even made it into the kids’ rooms. Campaign business cards are omni-present in neat stacks on the kitchen counter. Our world revolves around this campaign, and then unexpected moments like this one remind me that we are not doing this alone.

We are on this journey with the support of so many people. Some of them are our close friends and family, who help maintain normalcy for our kids, who check in on our stress level, who ask how the campaign is going and always follow up with “and how are you doing?”

Others are people whom we have hired for their expertise. We don’t know what we don’t know, so we have hired a small and dedicated team to guide us through the process and to help navigate our path to victory.

Others, we have never met, but this group is frisking: People who follow on social media or attend our events because they believe in the vision of a regular guy wanting better for his community.

All of these people help lighten the load. This is a people-driven campaign. We are putting in the hard work so that Mike can represent our community and restore a sense of togetherness and responsibility. We are not doing it alone.

Our daughter’s teacher asked me this week if Mike always wanted to be a politician and I laughed out loud before I could stop myself. No, but he felt called to enter politics because he saw “the many” being pushed down so “the few” could rise. Maybe you have never seen yourself as political. Maybe this is your moment to get involved. We could use you on our team.

All campaigns need money to keep moving forward. If that is a way you can help, please consider a recurring donation. Equally important is having a pool of passionate volunteers. You have something unique to offer and we’d love to talk about what that might be.

Maybe you love talking to people and would be a natural on the phone. Maybe you hate talking to people and want to drop off yard signs without any talk of politics. There is no one way to help and we are grateful for all of the ways that people have supported us.

As you go about your weekend, I have a favor to ask. Would you please take a minute to think of what amazing and unique skill you have that could further Mike’s campaign. From there, I ask that you reach out and tell us about it. A campaign takes all sorts of people, skills, talents and opinions... and we would love to have you on our team.

Hoping to hear from you,

Renee Van Someren
---
|
---

body:
| | | [ ](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=eb3ec144af&e=89fb4d5220)
---
| Folks,

The primary election is just around the corner, with only 65 days until May 24th. We're excited for a big week ahead with President Trump coming back to Georgia to rally support for David. Here are some key updates from our campaign.

Thanks for all you do!

– Team Perdue

* * *
_**President Trump's Rally In Georgia**_ President Trump is coming back to Georgia for a BIG rally for us on Saturday, March 26th at 7:00 PM in Commerce! We need all hands on deck to make this a huge success.
**[SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER HERE!](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=f2b032fa23&e=89fb4d5220)**

[](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=dbd05eaa2c&e=89fb4d5220) You can find more information on the rally and register for a free general admission ticket [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=d33da789a4&e=89fb4d5220).

David previewed President Trump's message on [The Sean Hannity Show](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=a44441e3df&e=89fb4d5220): "President Trump is going to let us know what's at stake here. If you want a Republican President in 2024, and you want to get the Senate Majority back in 2022, we've got to win this Governor's race."

_**David Talks Biden Madness On CNBC Squawk Box**_

David joined CNBC's Squawk Box and discussed the madness going on in Washington. Joe Biden withdrew sanctions from Russia, ended our energy independence, and gave Putin the power to become the murderous thug we see today. [](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=0d798ff2ff&e=89fb4d5220) **American Energy:** "I would open up our energy resources. That's the simplest thing we can do right now as a country. We need to open up the pipeline again, get ANWR opened up, and rely on our own resources." **Buyer's Remorse:** "Runaway inflation, a crisis in Ukraine, we're now energy dependent again, the border is open. I think many people are now looking at this with buyer's remorse."

_**Proud To Be Pro-Life**_

On Tuesday, David visited Sound Choices Pregnancy Clinic in Columbus and learned about their work to protect life. David has been **certified pro-life** by the Georgia Life Alliance, and as Governor, he will continue fighting for pro-life policies, just as he did in the U.S. Senate.

**_President Trump: Vote For David Perdue_**

Last week, President Donald Trump slammed 20-year career politician Brian Kemp and highlighted his complete and total endorsement of David Perdue in the race for Governor of Georgia. In a statement, President Trump said: “David is running against Brian Kemp, a horrendous RINO who has betrayed the people of Georgia, and betrayed Republican voters... **David is a fearless and outstanding conservative leader** , and he is the ONLY candidate who can beat Stacey 'The Hoax' Abrams this November.”

---

name: Rick Scott
subject: It’s downright un-American
body:
Peter,
Socialism is un-American and always leads to poverty oppression.

_And every day the government grows, we get closer and closer to a socialist disaster._

**We MUST get rid of the old, top-down, government-run-everything system we have today.**

**I put together an 11-point plan to RESCUE AMERICA, and shrinking the federal government and growing our economy is an integral part of our plan.**

[**Read our plan to RESCUE AMERICA and stop socialism from destroying our economy today!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=c47eb1f4574545809e0c178e3074ce4f&_e=cbYswa-7GWSBPHCoWILix_kkYtCQ9--eEaiYjbn1r8Il7ni9sn-KtGHNEJREZxgFyNVI9MypsdjEbzHPjpTIVIjIXy0U92KP2_vsL1RldklukhKqLXt6Sqj_Hyivt4Dd9M55W3Z0VjXy8t90uXiDRxYAzJ2pYKJNQ0J5sRwfOKppZZFpl3XJOfH7c1qZ_7gWGGCA8sgbwYJu3RY49dwBsoPZTe9XfkN3rd4at307D98f7TaQsGrUA_XIgcG8HK-ekZzxVF6S5GvmEc1ElSZJ8788OTfP9it0KqpwrXlBSNQAaBHxYY0fToI8fUh6WCYllhcEClNmEk65FUujRGSXF55ow_sJaU2VbMjUI52LTC-aPmWISRDaEvJLgQ7zuniIazjdC6Y45rDZx2nynW0Ty3qt3zNAOswgTHpp_c_T-9I%3D)
__ [**READ THE PLAN**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=c47eb1f4574545809e0c178e3074ce4f&_e=cbYswa-7GWSBPHCoWILix_kkYtCQ9--eEaiYjbn1r8Il7ni9sn-KtGHNEJREZxgFyNVI9MypsdjEbzHPjpTIVIjIXy0U92KP2_vsL1RldklukhKqLXt6Sqj_Hyivt4Dd9M55W3Z0VjXy8t90uXiDRxYAzJ2pYKJNQ0J5sRwfOKppZZFpl3XJOfH7c1qZ_7gWGGCA8sgbwYJu3RY49dwBsrPjN1WXJhZmsBghaeNvlFc7UbMvCmQVNQ1CsmkDcQcr5gf8XgwVx5qmdYFVmdQDxnaxhioFGmtuK57Ea8Kb5JBzEn8Z_neO7kgq9BxXbzcH8K4DahADoOVX_iXGXHugWCFwntCNz1GlRmLhoTVAy_lQD-WS4V_EX1Z8iMk6ru9qxJGFUKfO5CKQ2lpX-HRJw8rV1GMJeNmgFlE4GsbYPGQ%3D) If American businesses can serve our citizens better and cheaper than the government, the work should go to them, Peter.

A big, bloated, and inefficient government takes precious money out of YOUR pocket.

[**If you’re ready to have more money in YOUR pocket, read our plan to RESCUE AMERICA and save our economy today.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=c47eb1f4574545809e0c178e3074ce4f&_e=cbYswa-7GWSBPHCoWILix_kkYtCQ9--eEaiYjbn1r8Il7ni9sn-KtGHNEJREZxgFyNVI9MypsdjEbzHPjpTIVIjIXy0U92KP2_vsL1RldklukhKqLXt6Sqj_Hyivt4Dd9M55W3Z0VjXy8t90uXiDRxYAzJ2pYKJNQ0J5sRwfOKppZZFpl3XJOfH7c1qZ_7gWGGCA8sgbwYJu3RY49dwBsqMDrEFkBsr0wNSJOBRP39sSiJlHk-UzLBv-rin7YVL5Fs5s4oN82Xfz_WvTrFOE7Ucuqdk9KLnhdPkmxIv3JIjPpNaOHWLMfn-OebzY_vT0ZmEZgPMZDBWyiZeYGId5QTEdoWFCLuI0cUcttg1tHXzNfeJD9IM5Bm4acWlVEGRiUZFlT8JQQdGFEKEqT5BDQKcRcIl-vhaNTALpjQ5wrB4%3D) [**READ THE PLAN**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=c47eb1f4574545809e0c178e3074ce4f&_e=cbYswa-7GWSBPHCoWILix_kkYtCQ9--eEaiYjbn1r8Il7ni9sn-KtGHNEJREZxgFyNVI9MypsdjEbzHPjpTIVIjIXy0U92KP2_vsL1RldklukhKqLXt6Sqj_Hyivt4Dd9M55W3Z0VjXy8t90uXiDRxYAzJ2pYKJNQ0J5sRwfOKppZZFpl3XJOfH7c1qZ_7gWGGCA8sgbwYJu3RY49dwBshZ0neVt1dB6vNA41XyGcovo-T05UMekBGlpNIV9qXqf1Jiqw3oatIRoko8PpHCnNUA0Eoo5u9zQljQrS4X1BB_3FzZcsPXnmeVWYdvh4sOLylZlaIqMx8T0BKpnOrhes6kURaJZ_j9uRHvjZ_r7Utslca1f8DXNCHOIMMlvbKL6bFIsv5dAeMoTiF7wveKL1DNGY7nI5i1dJiUr272frHg%3D) Thank You, Rick Scott Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Brice Wiggins Weekly Legislative & Campaign Trail Update March 20, 2022
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2eac6ce4dee6/brice-wiggins-for-congress-highlights-from-the-campaign-trail-8861705?e=698f056321)
---
Here is a recap of a few highlights from this week in my role as State Senator from District 52, as well as updates from our Congressional Campaign. Fulfilling my duties as State Senator will be a top priority for me during this campaign. After all, I took an oath to honorably serve my constituents and the Constitution.
|
---
|
---
_"The general limits of your freedom are merely these: that you do not trespass upon the equal rights of others."__\- General/President Dwight D. Eisenhower, Remarks to the National Society of the Daughters of the American Revolution, April 22, 1954_
|
---
## Ingalls At Risk: I Wrote To The Chief of Naval Operations
| | | | | | After reading that Ingalls Shipbuilding's future could be uncertain with the Navy's new shipbuilding plan, I wrote a letter on Wednesday to the U.S. Chief of Naval Operations. As the Mississippi State Senator in the District where Ingalls Shipbuilding is located, it demanded that I express my concern over any potential reduction at Ingalls as a result of this shift. I believe large vessels are important to America’s defense and our show of strength abroad. Throughout my service as Senator and in this campaign, I have kept Ingalls front and center as it is that important to the defense of our country, the foundation of South Mississippi and the livelihood of so many hardworking people. Read my full letter by clicking [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=20e883969b&e=698f056321).|
---
|
---
## Historic Teacher Pay Raise A Reality
| | | | | |
---
| I have served on the Senate Education and Appropriations committees since coming to the legislature. So, I was ecstatic when we in the Senate passed the final version of an historic teacher pay raise. One of this magnitude has been a longtime coming, but we made it happen. This is what it means to prioritize and govern, something you will get from me in Congress.|
---
## Attended Military One Coast Annual Meeting
| | | | | | I know what truly matters. Our military men and women are what matters, and we support our military here in the 4th district. It was great to attend the Military One Coast Annual Meeting on Wednesday morning to show my appreciation and commitment to our military installations and hear updates from local military base commanders on current base activities. A great event hosted by the Mississippi Gulf Coast Chamber of Commerce!|
---
|
---
## A Panelist for “Untapped Potential in MS: How Childcare & Early Education Impact Mississippi's Economy"
| | | | | |
---
| When you get things done, you can talk about them. I was thrilled to be invited on Thursday morning to be a part of the panel discussion for "Untapped Potential in MS: How Childcare & Early Education Impact Mississippi's Economy" hosted by The Children's Foundation of Mississippi.I authored Mississippi’s first early education initiative, the Early Learning Collaborative Act of 2013, and now Mississippi is recognized as Top 5 in the country for early education. To make this happen, I fought the status quo and members of my own party in and outside of the legislature. It’s this determination and vision that I will take with me to Congress to make things happen.Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=2c9b7fbd5e&e=698f056321) to watch our policy video on the importance of early education.|
---
## Spoke to Phoenix Club of Jackson
| | | | | | On Tuesday I spoke at the Phoenix Club of Jackson’s Monthly Luncheon. This non-profit organization of young professionals is dedicated to fundraising and supporting the Boys & Girls Clubs of Central Mississippi. I appreciate all they do for the community in Central Mississippi.Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ea4524be44&e=698f056321) to see their post that I am featured in from the luncheon.|
---
|
---
## Opened St. Jude Fishing Tournament With Morning Prayer
| | | | | |
---
| This past Saturday I had the honor of opening the St. Jude Fishing Tournament in Gautier with the morning prayer. Anglers came from all over South Mississippi to participate. God gave us tremendous natural resources and I grew up blessed to enjoy them! I try to do everything I can to honor His gift. |
---
## Tour of B&D Plastics
| | | | | | On Friday, I got the chance to tour B&D Plastics in Ocean Springs. This is one of the largest manufacturers of dual-laminate equipment in the United States. We have so many great things going on in South Mississippi that we should be proud of.|
---
|
---
## Pascagoula Art Sculpture Unveiling
| | | | | |
---
| On Friday I attended the unveiling of the first of three sculptures to be placed in downtown Pascagoula. These sculptures are titled “Building Blocks” and were designed and built by students at Pascagoula-Gautier School District’s Career and College Technical Institute. Downtown Pascagoula is on the rise, as well as young talent in South Mississippi. |
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
## The Week Ahead
* Conference committee work.
* Finalizing of Appropriations, including BP/GCRF.

|
---
Please stay tuned for future emails with updates from the legislative session, District 52, community events, and our Congressional campaign. Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.

Sincerely,
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=9032f5db66&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
|

clean_body: | | | Here is a recap of a few highlights from this week in my role as State Senator from District 52, as well as updates from our Congressional Campaign. Fulfilling my duties as State Senator will be a top priority for me during this campaign. After all, I took an oath to honorably serve my constituents and the Constitution. | | "The general limits of your freedom are merely these: that you do not trespass upon the equal rights of others."\- General/President Dwight D. Eisenhower, Remarks to the National Society of the Daughters of the American Revolution, April 22, 1954 | Ingalls At Risk: I Wrote To The Chief of Naval Operations | | | | | | After reading that Ingalls Shipbuilding's future could be uncertain with the Navy's new shipbuilding plan, I wrote a letter on Wednesday to the U.S. Chief of Naval Operations. As the Mississippi State Senator in the District where Ingalls Shipbuilding is located, it demanded that I express my concern over any potential reduction at Ingalls as a result of this shift. I believe large vessels are important to America’s defense and our show of strength abroad. Throughout my service as Senator and in this campaign, I have kept Ingalls front and center as it is that important to the defense of our country, the foundation of South Mississippi and the livelihood of so many hardworking people. Read my full letter by clicking .| | Historic Teacher Pay Raise A Reality | | | | | | | I have served on the Senate Education and Appropriations committees since coming to the legislature. So, I was ecstatic when we in the Senate passed the final version of an historic teacher pay raise. One of this magnitude has been a longtime coming, but we made it happen. This is what it means to prioritize and govern, something you will get from me in Congress.| Attended Military One Coast Annual Meeting | | | | | | I know what truly matters. Our military men and women are what matters, and we support our military here in the 4th district. It was great to attend the Military One Coast Annual Meeting on Wednesday morning to show my appreciation and commitment to our military installations and hear updates from local military base commanders on current base activities. A great event hosted by the Mississippi Gulf Coast Chamber of Commerce!| | A Panelist for “Untapped Potential in MS: How Childcare & Early Education Impact Mississippi's Economy" | | | | | | | When you get things done, you can talk about them. I was thrilled to be invited on Thursday morning to be a part of the panel discussion for "Untapped Potential in MS: How Childcare & Early Education Impact Mississippi's Economy" hosted by The Children's Foundation of Mississippi.I authored Mississippi’s first early education initiative, the Early Learning Collaborative Act of 2013, and now Mississippi is recognized as Top 5 in the country for early education. To make this happen, I fought the status quo and members of my own party in and outside of the legislature. It’s this determination and vision that I will take with me to Congress to make things happen.Click to watch our policy video on the importance of early education.| Spoke to Phoenix Club of Jackson | | | | | | On Tuesday I spoke at the Phoenix Club of Jackson’s Monthly Luncheon. This non-profit organization of young professionals is dedicated to fundraising and supporting the Boys & Girls Clubs of Central Mississippi. I appreciate all they do for the community in Central Mississippi.Click to see their post that I am featured in from the luncheon.| | Opened St. Jude Fishing Tournament With Morning Prayer | | | | | | | This past Saturday I had the honor of opening the St. Jude Fishing Tournament in Gautier with the morning prayer. Anglers came from all over South Mississippi to participate. God gave us tremendous natural resources and I grew up blessed to enjoy them! I try to do everything I can to honor His gift. | Tour of B&D Plastics | | | | | | On Friday, I got the chance to tour B&D Plastics in Ocean Springs. This is one of the largest manufacturers of dual-laminate equipment in the United States. We have so many great things going on in South Mississippi that we should be proud of.| | Pascagoula Art Sculpture Unveiling | | | | | | | On Friday I attended the unveiling of the first of three sculptures to be placed in downtown Pascagoula. These sculptures are titled “Building Blocks” and were designed and built by students at Pascagoula-Gautier School District’s Career and College Technical Institute. Downtown Pascagoula is on the rise, as well as young talent in South Mississippi. | | | | | | | | | The Week Ahead Conference committee work. Finalizing of Appropriations, including BP/GCRF. | Please stay tuned for future emails with updates from the legislative session, District 52, community events, and our Congressional campaign. Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below. Sincerely, | | | Keep Up With Us! | | | | | | | mailto:info@bricewiggins.ms| ---|---|---|---|--- | tel:6013853420 | | | Copyright (C) 2022 Brice Wiggins for Congress. All rights reserved.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: FWD - BREAKING: I’m calling for President Biden to take these executive actions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
These actions would lower health care costs, cancel federal student loan debt, expand worker power, raise wages, advance immigrants’ rights, combat the climate crisis, and so much more.
#
Hey Peter, we just wanted to make sure you saw Pramila’s email from the other day.
Progressives are ready to meet the real and serious needs of working families and deliver. While legislation is negotiated, Pramila is calling for more than a dozen executive actions the White House can take _on their own_ to lower health care costs, cancel student debt, save our planet, and so much more.
[**If you’re with Pramila in this fight to deliver victories for the people, rush a donation of $3 or more today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11179?refcode=em20220320-1120&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1120%2E420207%2E8L1qSe)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Pramila Jayapal**
Date: Thu, Mar 17, 2022
Subject: BREAKING: I’m calling for President Biden to take these executive actions
Peter,
Over the past year, Democrats in Congress and the White House have worked to not only recover from the pandemic and Trump years, but to deliver greater equity and economic security for people across the country. Tremendous progress has been made, but that work is far from done.
**That’s why the Congressional Progressive Caucus, which I proudly Chair, released a list of executive actions President Biden can and should take right away to deliver for our families, our communities, and our planet.**
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11179?refcode=em20220320-1120&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1120%2E420207%2E8L1qSe)
These executive actions would activate agencies across the federal government to **lower health care costs, cancel federal student loan debt, expand worker power, raise wages, advance immigrants’ rights, combat the climate crisis,** and so much more.
[**Democrats must use all the tools available to affect change for the people — that means legislation _and_ executive action. President Biden must use his executive power to effect change. If you’re with me and ready to see Democrats deliver major victories for the people, please chip in $3 now to fuel my calls for action.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11179?refcode=em20220320-1120&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=1120%2E420207%2E8L1qSe)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/11179?refcode=em20220320-1120&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1120%2E420207%2E8L1qSe)**
If President Biden takes the actions we’re recommending, here are just some of the positive outcomes we'll see:
* 38 million people will pay less money for their prescription drugs
* 43 million borrowers will be relieved of the heavy burden of student loan debt
* Millions of workers will get a raise after we increase the overtime eligibility threshold
* Millions of workers will get paid sick leave and vacation time
* Immigrants coming from countries in crisis will immediately be offered refuge
* Reducing mass incarceration and stopping the expansion of private prisons for immigrant detention
* Closing loopholes to make sure Wall Street is paying their fair share of taxes
* Investments in clean energy, clean air, and clean water to save lives and our planet

There is so much we can do right now to help families struggling to pay their bills and crises that threaten our communities and our planet.
[**Help fuel our work to make these executive actions a reality with a contribution today. We can only do this with all of your support — and together, we WILL deliver for the people! clean_body: These actions would lower health care costs, cancel federal student loan debt, expand worker power, raise wages, advance immigrants’ rights, combat the climate crisis, and so much more. Hey Peter, we just wanted to make sure you saw Pramila’s email from the other day. Progressives are ready to meet the real and serious needs of working families and deliver. While legislation is negotiated, Pramila is calling for more than a dozen executive actions the White House can take on their own to lower health care costs, cancel student debt, save our planet, and so much more. In solidarity, Team Jayapal \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Pramila Jayapal Date: Thu, Mar 17, 2022 Subject: BREAKING: I’m calling for President Biden to take these executive actions Peter, Over the past year, Democrats in Congress and the White House have worked to not only recover from the pandemic and Trump years, but to deliver greater equity and economic security for people across the country. Tremendous progress has been made, but that work is far from done. That’s why the Congressional Progressive Caucus, which I proudly Chair, released a list of executive actions President Biden can and should take right away to deliver for our families, our communities, and our planet. These executive actions would activate agencies across the federal government to lower health care costs, cancel federal student loan debt, expand worker power, raise wages, advance immigrants’ rights, combat the climate crisis, and so much more. If President Biden takes the actions we’re recommending, here are just some of the positive outcomes we'll see: 38 million people will pay less money for their prescription drugs 43 million borrowers will be relieved of the heavy burden of student loan debt Millions of workers will get a raise after we increase the overtime eligibility threshold Millions of workers will get paid sick leave and vacation time Immigrants coming from countries in crisis will immediately be offered refuge Reducing mass incarceration and stopping the expansion of private prisons for immigrant detention Closing loopholes to make sure Wall Street is paying their fair share of taxes Investments in clean energy, clean air, and clean water to save lives and our planet There is so much we can do right now to help families struggling to pay their bills and crises that threaten our communities and our planet. In solidarity, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

Fellow American,

**_Do you know what the majority of our issues all have in common?_** The obvious answer - Joe Biden and the Radical Left created them with failed Socialist policies. **[If you are able to chip in any amount today, we are one step closer to defeating the Biden Democrats in 2022!](http://links.tedbudd.gop/u/click?_t=b09820e737c0401797cbb3be06345c3f&_m=061ea7ac740b4ebf81984a0bb350a270&_e=yGDnwY6DhqB8iDqhgdOkLkA3iUm6GkjHsg0VI7X_1BjMFh_S9XITfNg19Eemtw0MbPaykwiV_mO3oRCZD3RNLTZUzzmB_OrVRp83VXyUbpQMrfTGpE9Ty9JhGunPJG_MHqP52JqA0e4neBubaEb4WgdxMuwaqr0JrI0N0Ggs2L-ApylQZjwWswERPGgpOqXd5h67_ezA0SCR60ein9Fft7zTS-1ryfPA_Ey5878u6YxAbTmLiIsR0hkgJCw7lk6Q_GwcbmtOKIhe1DLZ1KgOBa2zDSxy9it99m0N23mnBbKVGDTKG71QrNDV5k9BmK_KZetmyr6dVFtNP0dY-MLLlfctroJQcpzcVPBS6oQkYDIg8wAty7N39lBwNpjUjus-JpTEmekIC_5lRTY4Wmu4wxDz72oLRJiTcEv5uWtdahmE_-3l0k8hk9w_D1f7wW8YGeEzIDbBAzd2ZPdPmsgVsj1kDUpfsQzU0ECk98SSgqk%3D)** | [**DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS**](http://links.tedbudd.gop/u/click?_t=b09820e737c0401797cbb3be06345c3f&_m=061ea7ac740b4ebf81984a0bb350a270&_e=yGDnwY6DhqB8iDqhgdOkLkA3iUm6GkjHsg0VI7X_1BjMFh_S9XITfNg19Eemtw0MbPaykwiV_mO3oRCZD3RNLTZUzzmB_OrVRp83VXyUbpQMrfTGpE9Ty9JhGunPJG_MHqP52JqA0e4neBubaEb4WgdxMuwaqr0JrI0N0Ggs2L-ApylQZjwWswERPGgpOqXd5h67_ezA0SCR60ein9Fft7zTS-1ryfPA_Ey5878u6YxAbTmLiIsR0hkgJCw7lk6Q_GwcbmtOKIhe1DLZ1KgOBU4KezteUpdrLCshBFdyC8f23vmI2hQ2ZaTjlCTea5xrw_yYNB_lG_NXcaX3EfHD6qTDHx-_AIxB-Y6qe_iWlOt-TTIqbMeC_faCWA547ipECTKfTksmawkBTzxDBoSMatfI0HVk15etqpNVef2CtGC882N7c6ebqLoF2Mx-KKexme4kbbWHsSg7xNLfIn3nYjiItHWy6rhHQSBTTymaxOs%3D)

body:

Folks, I have some good news to share.

Even though my right-wing opponents are spending millions of their own
dollars to boost their campaigns (and have dark-money super PACs running
ads on their behalf), polls show that I’m in a dead heat with every one of
my Republican opponents.

But here’s the rub: Ohio’s Senate race is already one of the most
expensive races in the country. Soon, Republicans will be flooding the
airwaves with nasty smear campaigns and dishonest attack ads against me.

We need to get ahead of these attacks by launching positive ads of our
own—but right now, we’re not on track to raise the funds we need to keep
our ads up and running in every corner of Ohio.

We’re down by $8,286 and without an outpouring of grassroots support
today, I’m worried we won’t have the resources we’ll need to counter the
GOP’s lies.

important: Will you rush in

We’re down by $8,286 and without an outpouring of grassroots support today, I’m worried we won’t have the resources we’ll need to counter the GOP’s lies. [ ]What happens in Ohio will determine Senate control, so this is really important: Will you rush in $5 right now to help us keep our ads on the air so we can flip Ohio blue? [ ]Chip in $5 [ ]Other Amount Thank you, Tim [ ][IMG] We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [ ]click here. If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below! Box 189 Niles, Ohio 44446 United States [ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ ][IMG] You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Yesli Vega
subject: The Dems are falling apart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia
body:
Take Back the House

| [ ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=310daa6c5e094f179292ac9457b72e5d&_e=BRV3zyeUQiQcQZdfaVI92VnqK6JNqRvXNdhCiufDtyJpQUSxiIV2doVU8Q7vr4DHuV4e_56Qgh5B3ABjKR8Vq_402qDseE0Fa6G0BT5lzQ75vwbEnJYKNTCnqNQnXwiU2lJt_fmGAVpt67Wbhv-W9FPwpM-6fG94T9kEM2wp8EyG6RDJfl4JkvmWc1vGs8li-8m-0gil2LRuIqbsJuCYdF1uhnrBDsNFIDyvnaBSqJiWw2e6s91smoGn1w6Qmz7X0zWbEq1gELVDde1ewzLfHmDXW8CybXaySYYrdzxDEswSwL9Mm-n5V_d_AfZb7S43GT5qUhceqdWh9Gt5y2nd2BXxhmgGRyx-mTVM5nKj_qgD1zCuWQBw8rm5Haj7PRzLtHE8BWHsUSqKnq0cTdNMOk8bPDo1zftOkmTYl4uCXAWbPfXKOP820kwo9CZC7wLjbfFyzGs5PxzJkzCHsyjQnweBaJEdGtbxdovRRZ_qm1E%3D)
---
Friend,

We’ve seen it for the past year and it’s only getting worse - _**the Dems are falling apart.**_ Our borders are open, our taxes are higher, our gas prices are rising, and our law enforcement officers are being _disrespected_ and _forgotten_. | [**YES - I WANT TO WATCH THE DEMS FALL APART!** ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=310daa6c5e094f179292ac9457b72e5d&_e=BRV3zyeUQiQcQZdfaVI92VnqK6JNqRvXNdhCiufDtyJpQUSxiIV2doVU8Q7vr4DHuV4e_56Qgh5B3ABjKR8Vq_402qDseE0Fa6G0BT5lzQ75vwbEnJYKNTCnqNQnXwiU2lJt_fmGAVpt67Wbhv-W9FPwpM-6fG94T9kEM2wp8EyG6RDJfl4JkvmWc1vGs8li-8m-0gil2LRuIqbsJuCYdF1uhnrBDsNFIDyvnaBSqJiWw2e6s91smoGn1w6Qmz7XmAiathM2mkaq5Mg3QkuRdf0z4WTkdIUxDOUhEwnc3ecj5ppCz4-somBMorQH69lsmcsQRezSpV3GCUMM7hMu2Bf0nhzrfxPmx9lkVk8xEfSEM077WykiqbPQzLDftF5I8plMiXxZhwoAgWPwTqEbEEyrSgEVDlc0TNmkTgLeQGmQktqzPfIpxTBO2GSl0b2UXn6EMcZtTxFCBeFC2258LDPyT1K3o5nfKE9PjG8Jmi0%3D)
---
_There’s no question – this is our year. Republicans are fired up after seeing so many radical policies affect their communities, families, and wallets._ **We are going to Take Back the House in 2022 and I want YOU to be a part of this historic election.** [**YES - I WANT TO TAKE BACK THE HOUSE!** ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=310daa6c5e094f179292ac9457b72e5d&_e=BRV3zyeUQiQcQZdfaVI92VnqK6JNqRvXNdhCiufDtyJpQUSxiIV2doVU8Q7vr4DHuV4e_56Qgh5B3ABjKR8Vq_402qDseE0Fa6G0BT5lzQ75vwbEnJYKNTCnqNQnXwiU2lJt_fmGAVpt67Wbhv-W9FPwpM-6fG94T9kEM2wp8EyG6RDJfl4JkvmWc1vGs8li-8m-0gil2LRuIqbsJuCYdF1uhnrBDsNFIDyvnaBSqJiWw2e6s91smoGn1w6Qmz7XbHC42JosqIg_9_YhnSF7dJKmoLe-hyS-4C95Dd5lQzlfNGYnyoZsMHnLG6j2jVLCdK98qUTNtOlWEca0j-y3aYW5yvj6nz4SsOTrHHqw7ZeR88lYXIlOwBCvJdAXBSCqFDuW9lkLNfQHKfd278HqkeLFynk_4nPxNcN7l2wd4ZQW9lQpan9zCGsQFm5_94QsibVhKlpmNqxaIJYxKHWZELaZP0LShtYqW8C0UkUsgZ0%3D)
---

I promise to hit the ground running on _**Day One**_ to create better policies for Virginia families and ensure the FBI focuses on criminal terrorists infiltrating our border and NOT parents fighting for their kids. _**I will return our priorities to supporting our veterans, law enforcement and first responders, tackling the drug epidemic, and making sure your tax dollars are spent efficiently.**_

[**Join me in the fight to Take Back the House and hit the ground running in Congress.**](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=310daa6c5e094f179292ac9457b72e5d&_e=BRV3zyeUQiQcQZdfaVI92VnqK6JNqRvXNdhCiufDtyJpQUSxiIV2doVU8Q7vr4DHuV4e_56Qgh5B3ABjKR8Vq_402qDseE0Fa6G0BT5lzQ75vwbEnJYKNTCnqNQnXwiU2lJt_fmGAVpt67Wbhv-W9FPwpM-6fG94T9kEM2wp8EyG6RDJfl4JkvmWc1vGs8li-8m-0gil2LRuIqbsJuCYdF1uhnrBDsNFIDyvnaBSqJiWw2e6s91smoGn1w6Qmz7XgJTr61DPG9hVPovGLrd_IVhmYWdhppZkVmE8-xb1DVJYhYET4qef-7ryOAgN-83sdOC2rAss5jNOX6zew9ZaXeEX6BqpCQb1IVxHC_tH9ZA3ptWMDYHZyQ3DhwK38lK08ZOPBd8_OO_uUcgIIgOx9mTiTyjTCNboNVhAfgsIRd_YAOqBczJ02hBigmWoMGWCNtT9A2ibFFRwmadRiy8Ck4ESpIkeV2q7dYvjVl4tLOI%3D) [**YES - I SUPPORT CONSERVATIVE POLICIES FOR VIRGINIA!** ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=310daa6c5e094f179292ac9457b72e5d&_e=BRV3zyeUQiQcQZdfaVI92VnqK6JNqRvXNdhCiufDtyJpQUSxiIV2doVU8Q7vr4DHuV4e_56Qgh5B3ABjKR8Vq_402qDseE0Fa6G0BT5lzQ75vwbEnJYKNTCnqNQnXwiU2lJt_fmGAVpt67Wbhv-W9FPwpM-6fG94T9kEM2wp8EyG6RDJfl4JkvmWc1vGs8li-8m-0gil2LRuIqbsJuCYdF1uhnrBDsNFIDyvnaBSqJiWw2e6s91smoGn1w6Qmz7Xb_-z3xaH4UTceFu3TZhiuHfES0sNcA1yRZLICYAlsazCLOa96VhAfWFbi1IT66ZAIvcCDjOaRX8S9V8UgVfvgqBH-YaFpQdkEqyCpHc6edBjqmEo01rSkoyBD0jnfvolJ9FG1XHDTWNPPW50ySAw805X248vJOQAjgskDnPRE-l_trs6w9JTw041lTCt-Uw49MRi8iRcjtWrPPdmWni846UlMm3mRJov70-uUhlkuMg%3D)
---

Together, we will turn things around and **get Virginia – and Washington – back on track.** With your support, we will keep growing the **#YesToYesli** movement and Take Back the House.

God Bless,

[](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=310daa6c5e094f179292ac9457b72e5d&_e=BRV3zyeUQiQcQZdfaVI92VnqK6JNqRvXNdhCiufDtyJpQUSxiIV2doVU8Q7vr4DHuV4e_56Qgh5B3ABjKR8Vq_402qDseE0Fa6G0BT5lzQ75vwbEnJYKNTCnqNQnXwiU2lJt_fmGAVpt67Wbhv-W9FPwpM-6fG94T9kEM2wp8EyG6RDJfl4JkvmWc1vGs8li-8m-0gil2LRuIqbsJuCYdF1uhnrBDsNFIDyvnaBSqJiWw2e6s91smoGn1w6Qmz7XmKok-h4Gv7DLVR1vTaPxxXnrE1JjC19w164kSWIBEAspeh2BOjDaxr2heceQ-9t8240HtwcvVmigiN6UQvSZHkqDgly0_MHxXY0URuiW5gztduQrB8XAKH6VZ__O-l4tYSR_GPlOi5q4qbBMwqZ5vu9-uNlUEoNh0u0kzG8a2LSWJJxOvFROYmWZTTyHfW3raw1jaNwMFgMixRYnLJRIJYBDVllwURwqvuITmQiKS-A%3D)

Yesli Vega
_Conservative Republican for Congress_

name: Congresswoman Miller-Meeks
subject: URGENT MATTER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress
body:
The Dems need to get their priorities in check

| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=e82adf4398df46fdb7b458779570ee69&_e=FAGob4POLkwTpGoV-o2gBsA2dqqv3qjZN-NzLejRjtw6hlDXdFS-TUM7WhmIgNmR0F3NOcASGAe2hT1ESBFtKWVh67-guKxlvw-_JGNlWzzWUvkYtQvFPjehzYdYpoUz0E0xAghi0uUsXN7Q0Gt2KcKo4Hhgf6Tdmsta6Fr61XOhxEivXrcrSE0irz7Mv_oEixf_1_LNwvpIuLsw3hpp386X3OIFBLHKrfG3WkD2-Xb9wDbracIziJRfcnH0wkgf-PwsqYLGlW_hGe6v0pQE2wICdU0XnZxI6Bd9r7GdGx61eKD-Utn4m-TGlzhcUMKRO_dKdeggPe86H00nKGmDzs9h_LDV5FSP2FzEKwDDEu_D1aJ6m1mV2cFY6kWFo95mmacKKGNOHApM2Z5i6XQaouJo8GCBmJbi21qXWXlKPtNoMrLDLoqU7ptQmHnhjn9EjQEP8IlZTNEJ1vNnK7f_1Kb_8_Eo4XqGJIHLkkujBWASMLt16ru-UcpOSqbrrCnGGdIQLjDphq1ZpjnX3y0SUzYP18FifnLWlxlEChASCyI%3D)
---
Friends,
_**WE MUST PRESERVE CONSERVATIVE VALUES IN AMERICA!**_

It has been made abundantly clear in the past few weeks that Americans need new leadership and conservative leadership at that!

Inflation is skyrocketing, and our gas prices have reached an ALL-TIME HIGH. **Radical Democrats in leadership need a major reality check.**

name: Team Oakley
subject: Follow the money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

Today, we want to do something a bit different. We want to play a game of connect the dots.

Here are three seemingly unconnected things:

1. Rep. Donald Payne Jr.
2 Merck Pharmaceuticals
3. Florida’s “Don’t Say Gay” bill

And here’s the one thing that links them all together: money.

This month, the Florida GOP passed the “Don’t Say Gay” bill — a disgusting attack on free speech that bans teachers and students from discussing sexual orientation or gender identity in schools.

As it turns out, Merck Pharmaceuticals was a MAJOR DONOR to Florida politicians who sponsored this hateful, bigoted piece of legislation (surprise, surprise).

And, Merck Pharmaceuticals has also given THOUSANDS OF DOLLARS to Rep. Donald Payne Jr.

If you want to see what kind of politician Rep. Payne Jr. really is, all you have to do is follow the money.

And if you want to fight back, all you have to do is click here, chip in $5, and help us elect a real progressive to fight for us in Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=320merck]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=320merck]

Imani Oakley has always stood with the LGBTQ community, and she’s never taken a dime from a corporate PAC like Merck.

Rep. Payne Jr. can’t say the same. In fact, he did next to no work to support the LGBTQ community until Imani called him out on it.

So we say it’s time to replace him.

Help us elect a Congresswoman who has NEVER wavered in her support for the LGBTQ community and NEVER compromised her progressive values to rake in corporate money. Click here to chip in $5 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=320merck]

Thank you for standing with us.

— Team Oakley

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.
